example.en: ...memories of her father's complete abandonment of her.
example.zh: …她父亲对她的彻底抛弃的那些记忆。

example.en: Both were big at birth but were not abnormally large.
example.zh: 这两个孩子出生时都比较大，但并非异常的大。

example.en: ‘Do you let your kids travel alone at night?’ ‘Absolutely not!’
example.zh: “你会让孩子们晚上单独外出吗？”“当然不行！”

phrases.zh: [计]抽象类（不允许实例化的类）

example.en: By the age of seven, children are capable of thinking in abstract terms .
example.zh: 儿童到了七岁就具有抽象思维的能力。

example.en: several cases of child abuse
example.zh: 数宗虐待儿童案

example.en: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth
example.zh: 加快经济增长速度的措施

example.en: We have accomplished all we set out to do.
example.zh: 所有计划要做的事情，我们都已完成。

phrases.zh: 总会计师；会计主任，会计处长

example.en: The boss dropped an accountant from the payroll.
example.zh: 老板把一名会计师从在职人员名单中除了名。

example.en: Interest will accrue until payment is made.
example.zh: 利息将会累计增加，直至付清款项。

example.en: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel.
example.zh: 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

example.en: The professor stands accused of (=  has been accused of  ) stealing his student’s ideas and publishing them.
example.zh: 那位教授被指控剽窃学生的观点拿去发表。

example.en: She tried to accustom herself to the tight bandages.
example.zh: 她尝试着使自己习惯那些紧绷的绷带。

example.en: Frances achieved very good exam results.
example.zh: 弗朗西丝考试取得了优异成绩。

phrases.zh: 相识不深的人；不完整或肤浅的知识

example.en: She was a casual acquaintance of my family in Vienna.
example.zh: 她是我们家在维也纳的一个交情不深的朋友。

example.en: Cooking fumes may activate the alarm.
example.zh: 烹调时的油烟可能会触发警报器。

example.en: We continue to conduct tests, but increasingly, we conduct long conversations with her, acutely aware that our creation will raise many ethical questions on the part of the public.
example.zh: 我们将继续进行测试，但越来越多地，随着长时间的交谈，我们敏锐地意识到，我们的作品将在公众当中引起许多道德问题。

example.en: Meanwhile, Walt's meth-business partner, the addict Jesse, is still recovering from the drug-related death of his girlfriend Jane at the end of last season.
example.zh: 而沃特的制毒搭档——瘾君子杰西还未从女朋友之死的痛苦中恢复过来。 他的女朋友简在上一季结尾时死于毒品。

phrases.zh: ◎(法律、惩罚等的)施行，执行，实行，实施；(药的)服用；用法；给与；(庄严的誓言或诺言的)提出，宣誓
公共行政；公共管理；行政管理

example.en: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration.
example.zh: 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

example.en: The courts were asked to adopt a more flexible approach to young offenders.
example.zh: 法庭被要求对少年犯采取更为灵活的处理方法。

example.en: a great adventure
example.zh: 一大奇遇

example.en: an adventurer travelling the world
example.zh: 周游世界的冒险家

phrases.zh: 不良反应；逆反应；有害反应

example.en: They fear it could have an adverse effect on global financial markets.
example.zh: 他们担心这会对全球金融市场产生不利影响。

example.en: I think everyone has something from their past that they're worried might adversely affect how they raise their children.
example.zh: 我想每个人都会担心自己过去的某些事可能会对他们如何培养孩子产生不利的影响。

example.en: She looked back on those days with affection .
example.zh: 她深情地回顾那些日子。

phrases.zh: 隐秘的议程；幕后的动机

example.en: The Republicans have stuck to their conservative agenda.
example.zh: 共和党人坚持自己的保守议题。

example.en: Their money problems were further aggravated by a rise in interest rates.
example.zh: 由于利率上调，他们的财务问题更加严重。

example.en: As a mother, I agonize over what my children will inherit.
example.zh: 作为一个母亲，我对我的孩子们将要继承的东西感到极度痛苦。

example.en: an index to aid the reader
example.zh: 方便读者的索引

phrases.zh: 提防；警戒著；随时准备著
紧急警报，红色警报；应急状况

example.en: The animal raised its head, suddenly alert.
example.zh: 那只动物突然警觉地抬起头来。

example.en: the alien environment of the city
example.zh: 城里陌生的环境

example.en: an allergic reaction to nuts
example.zh: 对坚果的过敏性反应

phrases.zh: 没有别的办法了；没有其他选择

example.en: New ways to treat arthritis may provide an alternative to painkillers.
example.zh: 治疗关节炎的新方法可能会提供一种止痛药的替代品。

example.en: She’s got an analytical mind.
example.zh: 她思维缜密。

example.en: the ancient civilizations of Asia
example.zh: 亚洲的古代文明

example.en: slender ankles
example.zh: 纤细的脚踝

phrases.zh: 匿名戒酒互助社；慝名戒毒会

example.en: the anonymous author of a collection of poems
example.zh: 一本诗集的佚名作者

example.en: Sales are better than anticipated.
example.zh: 销量比预期要好。

phrases.zh: 焦虑症；焦虑性障碍；焦虑症候群

example.en: his feelings of anxiety
example.zh: 他焦虑的心情

example.en: She lives in a small apartment.
example.zh: 她住在一套小公寓里。

example.en: The campaign failed because of public apathy.
example.zh: 由于公众反应冷淡，这次运动失败了。

example.en: I’m so sorry, I do apologize.
example.zh: 非常对不起，我真心道歉。

example.en: What is a reasonable standard for one family is not applicable for another.
example.zh: 对一个家庭合理的标准对于另一个家庭并不适用。

example.en: We have had lots of applicants for these positions.
example.zh: 对这些职位我们已有了很多申请人。

example.en: officials appointed by the government
example.zh: 政府任命的官员

example.en: There is a murmur of appreciative laughter.
example.zh: 有一阵低低的赞赏的笑声。

phrases.zh: 学习...的入门；学习...的途径

example.en: He decided to adopt a different approach and teach the Bible through story-telling.
example.zh: 他决定采用一种不同的方法，通过讲故事来教授《圣经》。

phrases.zh: 酌情；[拉丁语]视情况而定

example.en: The timing of the announcement was particularly appropriate .
example.zh: 通告发布的时机很合适。

example.en: You've never approved of Henry, have you?
example.zh: 你从未赞赏过亨利，是吧？

phrases.zh: 竭力反对；进行武装斗争

example.en: Matt’s behavior was arousing the interest of the neighbors.
example.zh: 马特的行为渐渐引起了邻居的兴趣。

example.en: He was unbearably arrogant.
example.zh: 他的傲慢让人无法忍受。

example.en: artificial flowers
example.zh: 假花

example.en: a south-facing aspect
example.zh: 朝南方向

example.en: a plot to assassinate the President
example.zh: 刺杀总统的阴谋

example.en: The aircraft will continue to be assembled in France.
example.zh: 飞机将继续在法国组装。

example.en: a reading assessment test
example.zh: 阅读评估测试

example.en: Scotland has all kinds of happy associations for me.
example.zh: 苏格兰给我各种各样愉快的联想。

example.en: a tall athletic man
example.zh: 一个高大强壮的男子

phrases.zh: n. 学业风气，学习氛围

example.en: The hotel had a lovely relaxed atmosphere .
example.zh: 那家宾馆的气氛轻松愉快。

example.en: a car park attendant
example.zh: 停车场的服务员

example.en: This provided a pretext for the authorities to cancel the elections.
example.zh: 这给当局提供了一个取消选举的借口。

example.en: an agreement between the US and Colombian authorities
example.zh: 美国和哥伦比亚当局的一份协议

phrases.zh: 鉴别与授权；验证和授权

example.en: You need special authorization to park here.
example.zh: 在此停车要有特别的许可。

example.en: an automatic weapon
example.zh: 自动武器

phrases.zh: 辅助设备，附属设备；备用设备

example.en: an auxiliary nurse
example.zh: 助理护士

phrases.zh: 可用于…的；对…有效的；能参加…的

example.en: Tickets are available from the box office.
example.zh: 售票处有票出售。

phrases.zh: 品牌意识，商标意识；品牌知名度

example.en: Health officials have tried to raise awareness (=  improve people’s knowledge  ) about AIDS.
example.zh: 卫生部官员努力提高人们对艾滋病的认识。

example.en: an awesome responsibility
example.zh: 一项令人惊惧的责任

example.en: There is no emergency back-up immediately available.
example.zh: 没有立即就能获得的后备。

example.en: Is it possible to multiply bacteria in the laboratory?
example.zh: 有可能在实验室繁殖细菌吗?

example.en: We’re going to the ballet tomorrow evening.
example.zh: 我们明天晚上要去看芭蕾舞演出。

example.en: She was barely aware of his presence.
example.zh: 她几乎没有注意到他的存在。

example.en: He advocated the removal of trade barriers.
example.zh: 他提倡消除贸易壁垒。

example.en: You have to take the top off to change the batteries .
example.zh: 你得把顶盖拿掉才能更换电池。

phrases.zh: 有助于成功的条件；成功一半

example.en: the Battle of Trafalgar
example.zh: 特拉法尔加战役

example.en: Students were evaluated without bias.
example.zh: 对学生的评估都是公正的。

example.en: ...recent biographies of Stalin.
example.zh: …近年的斯大林传记。

example.en: His photo stirred up bitter memories.
example.zh: 他的照片勾起了痛苦的回忆。

example.en: a bizarre coincidence
example.zh: 奇怪的巧合

example.en: Don’t blame me – it’s not my fault.
example.zh: 别来怪我——又不是我的错。

example.en: a silk blouse
example.zh: 丝质女衬衫

example.en: By changing the tomato’s genetic blueprint , scientists can alter the rate at which it ripens.
example.zh: 科学家可以通过改变番茄的基因蓝图来改变它的成熟速度。

phrases.zh: 在董事会，将在会上讨论；在那块木板上

example.en: a board meeting
example.zh: 董事会会议

example.en: The boom has created job opportunities.
example.zh: 经济繁荣创造了就业的机会。

example.en: So go out there and boost your brainpower, your mind will thank you.
example.zh: 所以走出去提升你的智力，你的思想会感谢你自己。

example.en: The area is of great botanical interest.
example.zh: 该地区很有植物学研究价值。

phrases.zh: 为…而费心，为…操心；用…打扰

example.en: Danny, don’t bother Ellen while she’s reading.
example.zh: 丹尼，埃伦看书的时候不要去打扰她 。

example.en: The bank has branches all over the country.
example.zh: 这家银行在全国各地都有分行。

example.en: The company looks poised to make a significant breakthrough in China.
example.zh: 该公司看上去稳将在中国实现一次重大突破。

example.en: Eagles breed during the cooler months of the year.
example.zh: 鹰在一年中较凉爽的季节交配繁殖。

example.en: a breezy and relaxed air of confidence
example.zh: 轻松自信的神态

example.en: The only way we could get into the country was by bribing the border officials.
example.zh: 我们要进入这个国家，唯一的办法是贿赂边境官员。

phrases.zh: 桥梁施工；桥梁结构；桥梁建筑

example.en: a fallen tree bridging the stream
example.zh: 倒下来架在小溪上的树

example.en: She fell off her bike and bruised her knee.
example.zh: 她从自行车上摔下来，擦伤了膝盖。

example.en: a brutal man
example.zh: 一个凶残的男人

phrases.zh: 使振作；打起精神；[俚]加快
n. 轻易得来的钱；投机赚钱

example.en: He was a rebel who bucked the system (=  opposed rules or authority  ) .
example.zh: 他是一个反抗体制的叛逆者。

phrases.zh: 举证责任；提供证据之责任

example.en: His family responsibilities had started to become a burden.
example.zh: 家庭责任已开始成为他的负担。

example.en: the reduction of unnecessary bureaucracy
example.zh: 消除不必要的官僚体制

example.en: The priest prepared the body for burial.
example.zh: 牧师为尸体做好了下葬的准备。

phrases.zh: 设计计算资料，设计计算书

example.en: Leonard made a rapid calculation: he'd never make it in time.
example.zh: 伦纳德做了个快速的估算：他不可能及时做完。

phrases.zh: 卡路里摄入量；热量摄取

example.en: A potato has about 90 calories.
example.zh: 一个马铃薯大约有90卡路里的热量。

example.en: Jones ran a good campaign.
example.zh: 琼斯的活动搞得很成功。

example.en: Our flight was cancelled.
example.zh: 我们的航班取消了。

example.en: I don’t think he’s capable of murder.
example.zh: 我认为他没有能力杀人。

phrases.zh: 承载量；结果能力；产仔能力

example.en: The room had seating capacity for about 80.
example.zh: 这房间能坐80个人左右。

example.en: capital investments
example.zh: 资本投资

example.en: Government troops have succeeded in capturing the rebel leader.
example.zh: 政府军已经成功抓获叛乱分子的头目。

example.en: the shade cast by low-hanging branches
example.zh: 低垂的树枝投下的阴影

phrases.zh: 灾害保险；不幸事故保险

example.en: Any history of bombing must also be a history of civilian casualty, for bombing saves the lives of soldiers only at the expense of other lives.
example.zh: 任何空袭的历史也必定是平民伤亡的历史，因为空袭救了士兵的性命只能以其他人的生命为代价。

phrases.zh: 产品类别；产品目录；积范畴

example.en: people in the over-45 age category
example.zh: 属45岁以上年龄组的人

example.en: a cautious driver
example.zh: 一位谨慎的司机

example.en: ...a large supermarket chain.
example.zh: …一家大型连锁超市。

example.en: The country was plunged into economic chaos.
example.zh: 这个国家陷入了经济大混乱。

example.en: A soulless shopping centre stands across from one of the few buildings with character, the town hall.
example.zh: 一座毫无生气的购物中心对面就是少有的几个别具特色的建筑物之一：市政厅。

example.en: Check the tiles carefully before you buy them.
example.zh: 购买之前要把瓷砖仔细检查一下。

example.en: His life is chronicled in a new biography published last week.
example.zh: 他的生平被写成一本新传记，于上周出版。

phrases.zh: 在流通中；在从事社交活动的

example.en: The Daily News once had the highest circulation of any daily in the country.
example.zh: 《每日新闻报》一度在该国所有日报中拥有最高发行量。

phrases.zh: 在这种情况下；既然这样

example.en: The Soviet Union had been forced by circumstances to sign a pact with Nazi Germany.
example.zh: 苏联为形势所迫同纳粹德国签订了一项条约。

example.en: The essay begins with a citation from ‘Hamlet’.
example.zh: 这篇文章开头引用了《哈姆雷特》中的一句话。

example.en: I don’t claim to be a feminist, but I’d like to see more women in top jobs.
example.zh: 我不会自称是女权主义者，但我希望看到更多的女性担任高职。

example.en: Reporters asked him to clarify his position (= say exactly what his beliefs are ) on welfare reform.
example.zh: 记者们要求他阐明他在福利改革问题上的立场。

example.en: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’.
example.zh: 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

example.en: A confidentiality clause was added to the contract.
example.zh: 合同中加上了一项保密条款。

example.en: Police have found a vital clue .
example.zh: 警方发现了至关重要的线索。

example.en: the coastal waters of Britain
example.zh: 英国的近海水域

example.en: The spy sent his message in code.
example.zh: 这个间谍用密码发送情报。

example.en: ...a collaborative research project.
example.zh: …一个合作研究项目。

phrases.zh: 损毁荷载，极限载荷；破坏负荷；临界纵向荷载

example.en: Uncle Ted’s chair collapsed under his weight.
example.zh: 椅子承受不了特德叔叔的重量，塌架了。

example.en: a collective decision made by all board members
example.zh: 董事会所有成员作出的集体决定

example.en: A car and a van collided on the motorway.
example.zh: 一辆汽车和一辆小型货车在高速公路上相撞了。

example.en: measures promoting local commerce and industry
example.zh: 促进地方工商业发展的措施

example.en: Are you ready to make a long-term commitment ?
example.zh: 你是否准备好作出长久的承诺？

example.en: agricultural commodities
example.zh: 农业商品

phrases.zh: 筋膜室综合征；间室症候群

example.en: The bag is divided into separate compartments .
example.zh: 这个包有一些独立的隔层。

example.en: ...the introduction of legislation to compel cyclists to wear a helmet.
example.zh: …强制骑车人戴头盔的法律的引入。

example.en: His life makes a compelling story .
example.zh: 他的一生是个引人入胜的故事。

example.en: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate.
example.zh: 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

example.en: Typing is considered by most employers to be a basic competence.
example.zh: 大多数雇主认为打字是一项基本技能。

example.en: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager.
example.zh: 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

example.en: a complicated pattern
example.zh: 复杂的图案

example.en: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products.
example.zh: 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

phrases.zh: 特许经营权合约；租让制合同

example.en: He took off his jacket as a concession to the heat.
example.zh: 因为气温高，他只好脱掉了夹克衫。

phrases.zh: 混凝土结构；具体结构；混凝土建造物

example.en: What does that mean in concrete terms ?
example.zh: 具体来说那到底是什么意思？

example.en: Aluminium, being a metal, readily conducts heat .
example.zh: 铝这种金属导热性能很好。

example.en: Vaughan is confined to a wheelchair .
example.zh: 沃恩离不开轮椅。

example.en: the threat of industrial conflict in the coalfields
example.zh: 煤田发生劳资纠纷的风险

phrases.zh: 与…相符，符合；遵照；和…相适应
合格评定；符合性评估；型式评价

example.en: We must act in conformity with local regulations.
example.zh: 我们必须按当地的法规行事。

example.en: The committee's confrontational style of campaigning has made it unpopular.
example.zh: 该委员会挑衅的宣传方式使之不得人心。

example.en: The EU Council of Finance Ministers failed to reach a consensus on the pace of integration.
example.zh: 欧盟财政部长会议未能就一体化的进度达成共识。

phrases.zh: 节约用水，水源保护；水利

example.en: wildlife conservation
example.zh: 野生生物保护

example.en: a very conservative attitude to education
example.zh: 对待教育非常守旧的态度

example.en: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona.
example.zh: 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

phrases.zh: 游戏控制台；携带型电脑游戏

example.en: No one could console her when Peter died.
example.zh: 彼得去世时没人能够安慰她。

example.en: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house.
example.zh: 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

phrases.zh: 建筑计划，建设项目；基建计划

example.en: a road construction project
example.zh: 道路修建计划

example.en: a management consultancy
example.zh: 管理咨询公司

example.en: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption.
example.zh: 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

example.en: However, contamination can occur at any point along the food chain, from field to table.
example.zh: 然而，污染沿着食物链可能在任何的点上发生，从田地到餐桌。

example.en: Andy was a good husband, and Nicky was clearly very content.
example.zh: 安迪是个好丈夫，尼基显然非常满足。

phrases.zh: 争论的焦点；争端的原因

example.en: His case has become a source of contention between civil liberties activists and the government.
example.zh: 他的案子已变成了公民自由活动家们和政府之间的争论缘由。

example.en: Two contrary views emerged.
example.zh: 出现了两种相反的观点。

example.en: The U.S. is contributing $4 billion in loans, credits, and grants.
example.zh: 美国以信贷和赠与的方式捐助了40亿美元。

phrases.zh: 捐赠，贡献给；为…做出贡献

example.en: All the money has been raised by voluntary contribution.
example.zh: 所有这些钱都是靠自愿捐献筹集的。

example.en: a political controversy
example.zh: 政治争议

example.en: Internet connections through conventional phone lines are fairly slow.
example.zh: 通过传统的电话线来连接因特网速度很慢。

example.en: a 19th-century converted barn
example.zh: 由19世纪谷仓改建的房子

example.en: a convicted murderer
example.zh: 已定罪的谋杀犯

example.en: Although I soon convinced him of my innocence, I think he still has serious doubts about my sanity.
example.zh: 尽管我很快就使他相信我是清白的，但是他还是非常怀疑我精神是否正常。

example.en: Too much alcohol affects your coordination.
example.zh: 喝酒太多会影响你动作的协调。

example.en: officials charged with bribery and corruption
example.zh: 被指控受贿和贪污的官员

phrases.zh: 总顾问；法律总顾问；律师事务所；法律咨询公司

example.en: My advisers counselled me to do nothing.
example.zh: 我的顾问建议我不要做任何事情。

example.en: new countermeasures against terrorism
example.zh: 对抗恐怖主义的新措施

example.en: I’d just returned from covering the Cambodian war.
example.zh: 我刚报道完柬埔寨战争回来。

example.en: live coverage of the match (= the match is broadcast at the same time that it is happening )
example.zh: 这场比赛的现场直播

example.en: Experts cannot agree on the causes of criminal behaviour .
example.zh: 专家对犯罪行为的原因不能取得一致意见。

example.en: The most important criterion for entry is that applicants must design and make their own work.
example.zh: 参加的最重要标准就是申请人必须设计并制作自己的作品。

phrases.zh: 批判性思维，批判性的思考；批判思考能力，判断思维

example.en: He made some highly critical remarks.
example.zh: 他发表了一些严厉的批判性言论。

example.en: Despite strong criticism , the new system is still in place.
example.zh: 尽管遭到了猛烈的批评，新制度依然原封不动。

example.en: The conservation of tropical forests is of crucial importance .
example.zh: 保护热带雨林至关重要。

phrases.zh: n. 场外交易市场；股票证券场外交易市场

example.en: measures to curb the spread of the virus
example.zh: 控制病毒扩散的措施

example.en: The bank can supply you with foreign currency .
example.zh: 这家银行能为你提供外币。

example.en: He wanted to ask her, but he didn’t dare.
example.zh: 他想问她，但又不敢。

example.en: She was hit by flying debris from the blast.
example.zh: 她被爆炸产生的飞散碎片击中。

example.en: He was the only thing there that seemed decent: and I thought he never looked better.
example.zh: 他是那里唯一的看上去很体面的人；我认为他从来没有这样好看过。

example.en: a decisive leader
example.zh: 果断的领袖

example.en: Offered the position of chairman, Smith declined, preferring to keep his current job.
example.zh: 对担任主席的邀约，史密斯拒绝了，他宁愿留在现在的职位上。

example.en: French and German were deemed essential.
example.zh: 法语和德语被认为是必需的。

example.en: All the cars are tested for defects before they leave the factory.
example.zh: 所有汽车在出厂前都经过品质检验。

example.en: The prince drew up his forces in a strong defensive position.
example.zh: 亲王将部队布成坚固的防御阵势。

example.en: Women who are dieting can become iron deficient.
example.zh: 节食的女性有可能缺铁。

phrases.zh: n. 贸易逆差；贸易赤字

example.en: the country’s widening budget deficit
example.zh: 这个国家日益严重的预算赤字

example.en: people who openly defy the law
example.zh: 公然抗拒法律的人

example.en: a deliberate attempt to humiliate her
example.zh: 对她的故意羞辱

example.en: There’s something I have to speak to you about – it’s a delicate matter .
example.zh: 我有件事要跟你讲——是一件需要谨慎处理的事。

example.en: The morning mail has just been delivered.
example.zh: 早晨的邮件刚送到。

phrases.zh: n. 社会主义；社会民主主义
协商民主；审议民主；商议性民主
自由民主；自由民主主义；自由民主制（一种政府形式，由人民选出的民意代表行使决策权力）

example.en: a return to democracy after 16 years of military rule
example.zh: 16年军人统治后民主制度的恢复

example.en: The government started to denationalize financial institutions.
example.zh: 政府开始将金融机构私有化。

phrases.zh: deny someone something 拒绝给予

example.en: The government denied the existence of poverty among 16- and 17-year-olds.
example.zh: 政府否认十六七岁的青少年当中存在贫困问题。

example.en: They've been deprived of the fuel necessary to heat their homes.
example.zh: 他们无法得到住房取暖必需的燃料。

example.en: At least six people were killed and about twenty injured when a train was derailed in an isolated mountain region.
example.zh: 火车在一片偏僻的山区脱轨，导致至少六人死亡，约二十人受伤。

example.en: Mr. Ying is one of those happy people who derive pleasure from helping others.
example.zh: 英先生是那种助人为乐的快活人。

example.en: He was a direct descendant of Napoleon Bonaparte.
example.zh: 他是拿破仑·波拿巴的嫡系后裔。

example.en: the descriptive passages in the novel
example.zh: 小说中的描写性段落

example.en: What have I done to deserve this?
example.zh: 我做了什么事，要得到这样的报应？

example.en: I had no money left and was desperate.
example.zh: 我身无分文，已经走投无路了。

phrases.zh: 旅游胜地；旅游目的地；旅游景点

example.en: Ellis Island has become one of America's most popular tourist destinations.
example.zh: 埃利斯岛已经成为美国最受欢迎的游览地之一。

example.en: the destructive power of modern weapons
example.zh: 现代武器的破坏力

phrases.zh: 独立式住宅；独立式房子

example.en: Try to take a more detached view .
example.zh: 尽量采取更为客观的态度。

example.en: Many forms of cancer can be cured if detected early.
example.zh: 如果发现得早，许多种癌症都可以治愈。

example.en: She hired a detective to find out if her husband was having an affair.
example.zh: 她雇了一个私人侦探调查她丈夫是否有外遇。

example.en: Genius is nothing but labor and diligence.
example.zh: 天才无非是工作和勤奋。

example.en: in the dim light of the early dawn
example.zh: 在微弱的晨曦里

example.en: The party’s share of the electorate has diminished steadily.
example.zh: 支持这个政党的选民比例持续下降。

example.en: Criminal behaviour can be linked to economic disadvantage.
example.zh: 犯罪行为可能会与经济困难有关。

example.en: At this point the path seemed to disappear altogether (= disappear completely ) .
example.zh: 小路到这里好像完全消失了。

example.en: Getting the rebels to disarm will not be easy.
example.zh: 要让叛乱分子解除武装并非易事。

example.en: We're looking for people from a wide range of disciplines.
example.zh: 我们正在寻找各类学科的人才。

example.en: The family agreed to disconnect her life support system.
example.zh: 家人同意切断她的生命维持系统。

example.en: Aspirin may discourage tumour growth in some types of cancer.
example.zh: 阿司匹林可能遏制某些恶性肿瘤的生长。

example.en: This policy of disengagement from the European war had its critics.
example.zh: 从欧战中逐渐撤军的政策遭到了批评。

example.en: dishonest traders
example.zh: 奸商

phrases.zh: 调度中心；运输中心；勤务中心

example.en: Goods are normally dispatched within 24 hours.
example.zh: 货物一般在24小时内派送。

translations.text: 比例不均地，不成比例地

example.en: Johnson’s aversion to this tax was part of his reluctance to ask for any sacrifices for the Vietnam War -- except from the disproportionately blue-collar army that was fighting it.
example.zh: 约翰逊对这项税的反感，部分是因为除了浴血奋战的不成比例的蓝领军人外，他犹豫要不要要求其他人为越战做出一点点牺牲。

example.en: He said the protesters were doing a disservice to the nation.
example.zh: 他表示，抗议者们的行为正对国家造成危害。

example.en: a rock band with a distinctive sound
example.zh: 音色独特的摇滚乐队

example.en: His account was badly distorted by the press.
example.zh: 他的话被报界严重歪曲。

example.en: a distribution centre
example.zh: 经销中心

example.en: subjects as diverse as pop music and archaeology
example.zh: 像流行音乐和考古学这样各不相同的学科

example.en: ...the illegal diversion of profits from secret arms sales.
example.zh: …销售秘密武器所得收益的非法转移。

phrases.zh: 多样性指数；歧异度指数

example.en: ...the cultural diversity of Latin America.
example.zh: …拉丁美洲文化的多样性。

phrases.zh: 把注意力从…转移开来；分散注意力

example.en: The high street is closed and traffic is being diverted .
example.zh: 大街封闭，车辆正改道而行。

example.en: You may get the dividend, but possibly not the capital appreciation.
example.zh: 你或许能 得到红利，但是资本可能不会增值。

example.en: ...a TV documentary on homelessness.
example.zh: …一部关于无家可归现象的电视记录片。

example.en: By hunting or gathering away from the group, both chimpanzee and dolphin moms ensure that what they find goes to their young.
example.zh: 黑猩猩和海豚妈妈们远离群体打猎和收集食物，并保证他们所找到的食物都给孩子们。

phrases.zh: 国内需求；本地内部需求

example.en: ...over 100 domestic flights a day to 30 leading U.S. destinations.
example.zh: …每天飞往美国30个主要目的地的100多个国内航班。

example.en: The industry is dominated by five multinational companies.
example.zh: 这个行业受五家跨国公司控制。

phrases.zh: 施主能级供体部位；给位；施主能级
n. 献血者，供血者；给血者

example.en: We urgently need more assistance from donor countries (= countries that give money, food etc to help in poor countries or disaster areas ) .
example.zh: 我们急需捐赠国的更多援助。

example.en: But I had no food in my dorm, so I had to go to canteen.
example.zh: 但是我在宿舍没有东西可吃，所以我只能去餐厅了。

phrases.zh: 零点漂移；最小容量；起点电容

example.en: Smoke drifted up from the jungle ahead of us.
example.zh: 我们前方的丛林里有烟升起。

example.en: a high school dropout
example.zh: 中学退学者

example.en: ...a country where drought and famines have killed up to two million people during the last eighteen years.
example.zh: …过去18年来干旱和饥荒致死达两百万人的一个国家。

example.en: Many people drowned when the boat overturned.
example.zh: 船翻后许多人淹死了。

example.en: City dwellers suffer higher pollution levels.
example.zh: 城市居民承受的污染程度更严重。

example.en: His eccentric behaviour lost him his job.
example.zh: 他古怪的行为使他丢了工作。

example.en: an ecological disaster
example.zh: 生态灾难

example.en: The newspaper edits letters before printing them.
example.zh: 这家报社刊登读者来信前先作校订。

example.en: The Labour Party won the 2001 election by a huge majority.
example.zh: 工党在2001年选举中以巨大优势获胜。

example.en: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
example.zh: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

example.en: a struggle for power within the ruling elite
example.zh: 统治阶层内部的争权夺利

example.en: an eloquent appeal for support
example.zh: 极具说服力的求助呼吁

example.en: The flowers emerge in the spring.
example.zh: 花儿在春天开放。

example.en: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards.
example.zh: 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

example.en: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past.
example.zh: 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

example.en: I want to thank everyone who has encouraged and supported me.
example.zh: 我要感谢每一位鼓励和支持过我的人。

phrases.zh: 无尽的爱；永无止境的爱
无穷尽的结；循环链；无端环链

example.en: an endless stream of visitors
example.zh: 川流不息的游客

example.en: I have never engaged in drug trafficking.
example.zh: 我从来没有从事过贩毒。

example.en: an enormous bunch of flowers
example.zh: 巨大的花束

example.en: Add fertilizer to enrich the soil.
example.zh: 施上肥料使土壤肥沃。

example.en: Class enrollment, where each student has all of the course schedule selections, each student having his own bucket in the CGTT.
example.zh: 班级入学，每个学生都有所有的课程安排选择，每个学生都将自己的选择放在 CGTT 中。

example.en: an enthusiastic supporter of reform
example.zh: 改革的热心支持者

example.en: They, like other necessity entrepreneurs, may have resorted to entrepreneurship due to a lack of better options.
example.zh: 他们像其他生存型企业家一样，因为没有更好的选择才会诉诸于创业。

phrases.zh: 防疫；疫病防治；流行病预防

example.en: Over 500 people died during last year’s flu epidemic.
example.zh: 去年流感大暴发期间有五百多人死亡。

example.en: an attempt to eradicate inflation
example.zh: 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

example.en: an imposing town hall, erected in 1892
example.zh: 一座气势宏伟的市政厅，建于1892年

example.en: His economic predictions are based on some erroneous assumptions.
example.zh: 他的经济预测是基于错误假设之上的。

example.en: Violence erupted after police shot a student during the demonstration.
example.zh: 警察向示威人群中的一名学生开枪，暴乱随之发生。

phrases.zh: 原发性高血压；特发性高血压

example.en: Window locks are fairly cheap and absolutely essential.
example.zh: 窗锁相当便宜，绝对有必要安装。

example.en: Peden was greatly esteemed by the people of Ayrshire.
example.zh: 佩登深受艾尔郡人的尊敬。

phrases.zh: n. 同种同文化之民族

example.en: The school teaches pupils from different ethnic groups.
example.zh: 该校教授不同种族的小学生。

example.en: the theory of evolution
example.zh: 进化论

example.en: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.
example.zh: 我三天没睡觉了——一点不夸张。

example.en: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
example.zh: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

example.en: A review panel concluded that there were no exceptional circumstances that would warrant a lesser penalty for him.
example.zh: 一个评估小组作出结论：没有什么例外情况可使他获得从轻惩罚。

phrases.zh: 超额生产能力；过剩设备

example.en: After you apply the oil, wait 20 minutes before wiping off any excess.
example.zh: 涂上油以后，等20分钟再擦掉多余部分。

example.en: his excessive drinking
example.zh: 他的酗酒

phrases.zh: 行政长官；董事长；美国总统；（美国的）州长

example.en: the union’s executive
example.zh: 工会的领导层

example.en: They exerted considerable influence within the school.
example.zh: 他们在校内施加了很大的影响力。

example.en: exotic birds
example.zh: 外国的奇异鸟类

phrases.zh: 业务扩张，营业扩充；经济高涨
膨胀系数，膨胀率；展开系数

example.en: The industry underwent a period of rapid expansion.
example.zh: 该产业经历了一轮快速扩张。

phrases.zh: 平均寿命；预期寿命（等于life expectancy）

example.en: Having raised expectations (= made people more hopeful ), he went on to help only a few people.
example.zh: 他唤起了大家的希望，但接着只是帮助了几个人。

example.en: an expedition to the North Pole
example.zh: 北极探险

phrases.zh: 市政开支；公用事业费用

example.en: the expenditure of time and money on your house or garden
example.zh: 你在房子或花园上所花费的时间和金钱

example.en: She was not an accountant and didn't have the expertise to verify all of the financial details.
example.zh: 她不是会计，不具有核查所有这些财政细目的专业知识。

example.en: Management have agreed to extend the deadline.
example.zh: 管理层已同意延长最后期限。

phrases.zh: 有几分，在某种程度上；在一定程度上

example.en: Things are not yet carried to that extent.
example.zh: 事情还没有发展到那种程度。

example.en: species in danger of extinction
example.zh: 有灭绝危险的物种

example.en: Extreme poverty still exists in many rural areas.
example.zh: 许多农村地区仍处于赤贫状态。

example.en: One eyewitness said he saw her talking to a man in a blue car.
example.zh: 一名目击者说他看见她在跟一个坐在蓝色汽车里的男子说话。

phrases.zh: 制造设施，生产设施；生产设备

example.en: What recreational facilities are now available?
example.zh: 什么娱乐设施现在是可用的？

example.en: Both faculty and students oppose the measures.
example.zh: 教师和学生都反对这些措施。

example.en: the fading evening light
example.zh: 渐暗的暮色

phrases.zh: 致命错误，不可恢复的错误

example.en: potentially fatal diseases
example.zh: 潜在致命的疾病

example.en: {"COLLOINEXA":["metal fatigue"]}
example.zh: 金属疲劳

example.en: He used color fearlessly--they were part of his stories, and an integral part of models' makeup, which was often key in completing the worlds McQueen envisioned.
example.zh: 他大胆地用着用着色彩——这是他的故事的组成部分，也是模特不可分割的组成部分，而这常是麦昆预想的世界的关键组成部分。

example.en: fierce fighting in the city
example.zh: 城里的激烈战斗

phrases.zh: 解决；算出；想出；理解；断定

example.en: Government figures underestimate the problem.
example.zh: 政府的数据对这一问题反映不足。

example.en: a fiscal crisis
example.zh: 财政危机

phrases.zh: v. 竭尽全力；用全速；疲惫

example.en: houses with flat roofs
example.zh: 平顶房

phrases.zh: 天然香辛料；天然调味料

example.en: When things had flavor , we knew what we were eating all the while ----and it satisfied us .
example.zh: 当食物有滋味的时候，我们从头到尾都知道自己吃的是什么，从中得到满足。

example.en: A design flaw (= a mistake or weakness in the way something was made ) caused the engine to explode.
example.zh: 一个设计缺陷导致了引擎爆炸。

example.en: His attackers turned and fled.
example.zh: 袭击他的人转身逃走了。

example.en: We can be flexible about your starting date.
example.zh: 你具体从哪天开始，我们可以灵活一点。

example.en: I looked up at the clouds floating in the sky.
example.zh: 我仰望着天上的浮云。

example.en: A footnote is made at the bottom of the page.
example.zh: 注脚列在书页下端。

example.en: The weather forecast is good for tomorrow.
example.zh: 天气预报说明天是晴天。

example.en: The courses were run to a consistent format.
example.zh: 这些课程的编排是有连续性的。

translations.text: 可怕的；令人敬畏的，令人惊叹的

example.en: The building is grey, formidable, not at all picturesque.
example.zh: 那幢建筑呈灰色，气势凛然，与漂亮沾不上边。

phrases.zh: 寄养家庭；抚养孤儿的家庭

example.en: The bishop helped foster the sense of a community embracing all classes.
example.zh: 主教鼓励一种包容各个阶层的社区精神。

phrases.zh: [英国英语]领取基金会提供奖学金(或津贴)的；属于由基金维持的机构的

example.en: the British Heart Foundation
example.zh: 英国心脏病基金会

example.en: Frankly, I think the Internet is overrated.
example.zh: 坦率地说，我认为因特网被高估了。

example.en: A bird had been locked in and was by now quite frantic.
example.zh: 一只鸟被关了起来，到现在它都非常狂躁。

example.en: I’ll just make some fresh coffee.
example.zh: 我来重新煮点咖啡。

example.en: Don’t stand so near the edge! You’re frightening me.
example.zh: 别站得那么靠边！你要把我吓坏了。

example.en: a novel about a family’s struggle on the American frontier
example.zh: 描写一家人在美国边远地区奋斗的小说

example.en: The fact that he’s working with amateurs really frustrates him.
example.zh: 与生手共事着实让他沮丧。

phrases.zh: v. 完全实现自己的抱负

example.en: And that is why we can fulfill our destiny.
example.zh: 这就是为什么我们能实现我们的命运。

example.en: Neil set off at a furious pace .
example.zh: 尼尔狂奔起来。

phrases.zh: 大惊小怪，小题大做；吵吵闹闹
焦虑；过分关心，过分体贴

example.en: James said he’d better be getting back or there’d be a fuss .
example.zh: 詹姆斯说他最好回来，否则就会有人小题大做了。

example.en: an exhibition of African art at the Hayward Gallery
example.zh: 海沃德美术馆的非洲艺术展览

example.en: ...the gap between rich and poor.
example.zh: …贫富差距。

example.en: I’ll just go and put the car in the garage.
example.zh: 我把车停到车库去。

example.en: people of the same gender
example.zh: 同性别的人

example.en: a useful technique for generating new ideas
example.zh: 能产生新创意的有用技术

example.en: Dietler is generous with his time and money.
example.zh: 迪特勒在他的时间和金钱方面慷慨大方。

example.en: genetic defects
example.zh: 遗传性缺陷

phrases.zh: 一个地方的风气或特色；一个地方的守护神

example.en: The film reveals Fellini’s genius.
example.zh: 这部影片展现了费里尼的天赋。

example.en: ‘Did he really?’ Her surprise seemed genuine.
example.zh: “他真的这样？”她好像是真的惊讶。

example.en: He was visiting professor of geology at the University of Georgia.
example.zh: 他曾是佐治亚大学的地质学客座教授。

phrases.zh: 做手势，表示；做一个手势

example.en: Luke made an obscene gesture with his finger.
example.zh: 卢克用手指做了一个下流的手势。

example.en: She led an exciting and glamorous life.
example.zh: 她生活奢华，充满刺激。

phrases.zh: 得意；踌躇满志；在某人的鼎盛时期

example.en: She dreamt of future glory as an Olympic champion.
example.zh: 她梦想着将来能得到奥运冠军的荣誉。

example.en: the leaders who govern the country
example.zh: 治理这个国家的领导人

phrases.zh: n. 国际汽车大奖赛；头等奖，最高奖

example.en: a grand country house
example.zh: 豪华的乡间大宅

example.en: At that time, we did not fully grasp the significance of what had happened.
example.zh: 当时，我们没有完全明白所发生之事的重要性。

example.en: Tears of gratitude filled her eyes.
example.zh: 她眼里充满感激的泪水。

example.en: They run a small grocery store.
example.zh: 他们经营一家小食品杂货店。

example.en: The bank will only lend me money if my parents guarantee the loan.
example.zh: 只有我父母作担保，银行才会给我贷款。

example.en: The Sergeant told Swift to guard the entrance.
example.zh: 中士叫斯威夫特守着入口。

example.en: Could you give us a guesstimate of the numbers involved?
example.zh: 你能给我们大致估计一下相关数字吗？

example.en: James took his habitual morning walk around the garden.
example.zh: 詹姆斯又像往常习惯的那样绕花园作晨间散步去了。

example.en: Stumbling through the smoke, the pilot emerged from the forward compartment, fumbled for the handgun at his belt.
example.zh: 烟雾间出现了飞行员跌跌撞撞的身影，他的手笨拙地摸索着腰带上的手枪。

example.en: Then he turned the handle and went in.
example.zh: 然后他转动把手走了进去。

example.en: an economic policy that caused great hardship for many people
example.zh: 造成许多人贫困的经济政策

phrases.zh: 严酷的现实；残酷的现实

example.en: The hostages are being held in harsh conditions.
example.zh: 人质被拘押在恶劣环境中。

example.en: The eggs take three days to hatch.
example.zh: 这些蛋要三天时间才能孵化。

phrases.zh: 道德危机；由于投保人可能不可靠所冒的风险

example.en: That pile of rubbish is a fire hazard (= something that is likely to cause a fire ).
example.zh: 那堆垃圾是火灾隐患。

example.en: So if someone asks you out, never hesitate.
example.zh: 如果有人叫你出去玩，千万别犹豫！

example.en: His career has been hindered by injury.
example.zh: 由于受伤，他的事业受到了阻碍。

example.en: Thanks for your hospitality over the past few weeks.
example.zh: 感谢你几周来的热情款待。

phrases.zh: n. 主办城市；举办城市

example.en: Which country is going to host the next World Cup?
example.zh: 哪个国家将主办下一届世界杯？

example.en: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .
example.zh: 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

example.en: A growing number of households have at least one computer.
example.zh: 越来越多的家庭拥有至少一台电脑。

phrases.zh: 人本教育；人文主义教育
人本主义心理学；人本心理学

example.en: Religious values can often differ greatly from humanistic morals.
example.zh: 宗教价值观常常和人文主义道德观相去甚远。

example.en: humorous stories
example.zh: 诙谐的故事

phrases.zh: 有效市场假说；有效率市场假说

example.en: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving.
example.zh: 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

example.en: He was too far away to be able to identify faces.
example.zh: 他离得太远，没法看面孔认出谁是谁。

example.en: the ideologies of fascism and terrorism
example.zh: 法西斯主义和恐怖主义的意识形态

example.en: The phone rang, but she ignored it.
example.zh: 电话铃响了，但她只当没听见。

example.en: a hormonal imbalance
example.zh: 内分泌失调

example.en: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount.
example.zh: 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

example.en: Champagne wines became immensely popular in the 18th century.
example.zh: 香槟酒在18世纪十分流行。

example.en: an illegal immigrant
example.zh: 非法移民

phrases.zh: 紧迫的威胁；逼近的威胁

example.en: A new trade agreement is imminent.
example.zh: 一项新的贸易协定即将签署。

example.en: They say they expect the meeting to have a marked impact on the future of the country.
example.zh: 他们说期望这次会议对国家的未来产生显著的影响。

example.en: Parents should beware of imposing their own tastes on their children.
example.zh: 父母应该提防把自己的兴趣强加给孩子。

example.en: The government imprisoned all opposition leaders.
example.zh: 政府把反对派领导人全部监禁起来。

example.en: inadequate resources
example.zh: 资源缺乏

example.en: As an added incentive, there’s a bottle of champagne for the best team.
example.zh: 给最优秀的队发一瓶香槟作为额外的鼓励。

example.en: The incidence of breast cancer increases with age.
example.zh: 乳腺癌的发病率随着年龄的增长而上升。

example.en: The incompetence of government officials is appalling.
example.zh: 政府官员的无能令人吃惊。

example.en: ...the consumer price index.
example.zh: …消费价格指数。

example.en: The study indicates a connection between poverty and crime.
example.zh: 研究显示贫穷和犯罪有关联。

example.en: This behaviour is indicative of her whole attitude, I’m afraid.
example.zh: 这一行为恐怕已表明了她的总体态度。

example.en: People have become indifferent to the suffering of others.
example.zh: 人们已经变得对别人的痛苦漠不关心。

translations.text: 不加选择地，不加区分地

example.en: Thatis, should you agree to share your private information with other people moreor less indiscriminately?
example.zh: 就是说，你应该同意把你的私人信息或多或少地不加选择地分享给其他人么？

example.en: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.
example.zh: 移动电话已经成为我们生活中的必需品。

example.en: His mother spoiled him, indulging his every whim.
example.zh: 他母亲对他纵容娇惯，百依百顺。

example.en: She was an industrious and willing worker.
example.zh: 她是个勤劳肯干的工人。

example.en: an ineffective marketing campaign
example.zh: 一场毫无成效的营销活动

example.en: A further escalation of the crisis now seems inevitable.
example.zh: 危机的进一步升级现在看来已不可避免。

example.en: She has an inexhaustible supply of funny stories.
example.zh: 她有讲不完的有趣故事。

phrases.zh: 婴儿配方；婴儿配方食品
婴儿死亡率，早期失效；早期故障期

example.en: An infant’s skin is very sensitive.
example.zh: 幼儿的皮肤非常敏感。

example.en: People with the virus may feel perfectly well, but they can still infect others.
example.zh: 带有这种病毒的人可能毫无症状，却仍可能传染他人。

phrases.zh: 膨胀压力；充气压力；轮胎压力

example.en: Inflation is now at over 16%.
example.zh: 通货膨胀率现已超过16%。

example.en: He had influential friends.
example.zh: 他有一些有影响力的朋友。

example.en: It is dangerous to inhale ammonia fumes.
example.zh: 吸入氨气是很危险的。

example.en: inherited wealth
example.zh: 继承的财富

example.en: I wish my son would show more initiative.
example.zh: 我希望我的儿子能表现得再主动一些。

example.en: The movie deals with injustices suffered by Native Americans.
example.zh: 这部电影讲述印第安人受到的不公正待遇。

example.en: We must encourage innovation if the company is to remain competitive.
example.zh: 公司要想保持竞争力，就必须鼓励革新。

example.en: We need someone who can inspire the team.
example.zh: 我们需要一个能鼓舞团队士气的人。

example.en: an instant success
example.zh: 马到成功

example.en: What do we instinctively do?
example.zh: 出于本能，我们会怎么做？

example.en: powerful institutions such as world banks
example.zh: 诸如世界银行之类的强大机构

example.en: Insufficient resources have been devoted to the health service.
example.zh: 用于医疗保健服务的资源不足。

example.en: I have always regarded him as a man of integrity.
example.zh: 我一直把他当作一个正直诚实的人。

example.en: a group of highly intelligent (= very intelligent )students
example.zh: 一组聪明异常的学生

example.en: I do not feel it intensely in my genitals alone, but I do feel it there as well as the rest of my body and…in my mouth…”.
example.zh: 使用男性阳具我都没有这种强烈的感觉，但是在那里及身体的其他部位..还有嘴巴..我却感觉到了。

example.en: While the other children interacted and played together, Ted ignored them.
example.zh: 当其他孩子们相互交往、一起玩耍时，泰德却不理他们。

phrases.zh: 社会互动；社会干预；社会的相互作用

example.en: But you only get the maximum benefit if you implement all of them, because their power comes from their interaction.
example.zh: 但您只能在实现所有方法的情况下获得最大收益，因为它们的力量来自它们之间的交互。

example.en: Industrial relations should be free from state interference.
example.zh: 劳资关系应不受政府干预。

example.en: One possible interpretation is that they want you to resign.
example.zh: 一种可能的解释是，他们想要你辞职。

example.en: interracial marriage
example.zh: 种族间的通婚

example.en: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting.
example.zh: 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

phrases.zh: [心]危机干预；危机处理；危机介入

example.en: government intervention to regulate prices
example.zh: 政府介入控制物价

example.en: The magazine carries an intriguing mixture of high fashion, gossip and racing.
example.zh: 这本杂志内容丰富有趣，有关时尚、花边新闻和赛马的内容都有。

phrases.zh: 侵犯个人隐私；侵犯隐私权

example.en: the annual invasion of teenagers for the Glastonbury Festival
example.zh: 每年前来参加格拉斯顿伯里音乐节的青少年的涌入

example.en: Life is full of little ironies.
example.zh: 生活中充满了小小的讽刺。

example.en: We’re focussing too much on irrelevant details.
example.zh: 我们过于关注不相干的细节。

example.en: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house.
example.zh: 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

example.en: Because of its geographical isolation, the area developed its own unique culture.
example.zh: 由于地理上的隔绝，该地区发展了自己独特的文化。

example.en: ...an independent judicial system.
example.zh: …一个独立的司法体系。

example.en: the members of the jury
example.zh: 陪审团成员

example.en: justifiable anger
example.zh: 情有可原的愤怒

example.en: In the Chief Constable’s view, the use of force was fully justified.
example.zh: 在警察局局长看来，使用武力是完全正当的。

example.en: Dogs have a very keen sense of smell.
example.zh: 狗的嗅觉十分灵敏。

example.en: Police appealed for wit­nesses after a woman was kidnapped at gunpoint.
example.zh: 一名妇女遭到持枪绑架，警方呼吁目击者挺身而出。

example.en: Alex’s real problem is that he lacks confidence.
example.zh: 亚历克斯的真正问题是缺乏信心。

example.en: Western banks still lag behind financial institutions in most other regions of the country.
example.zh: 西部地区的银行仍然落后于这个国家其他大部分地区的金融机构。

example.en: The company hopes to launch the new drug by next October.
example.zh: 公司希望于明年10月前推出这种新药。

example.en: I spent all morning mowing the lawn (= cutting the grass ).
example.zh: 我整个上午都在修剪草坪。

example.en: To the layman (= laymen in general ) all these plants look pretty similar.
example.zh: 对外行的人来说，这些植物看起来都很相似。

phrases.zh: 布图设计；布局设计；布线设计

example.en: Local legend has it that (= says that ) the island was the original Garden of Eden.
example.zh: 当地传说这个岛就是伊甸园的原型。

example.en: This is a very important piece of legislation (= law ).
example.zh: 这是一条非常重要的法规。

example.en: ...an attempt to get U.S. legislators to change the system.
example.zh: …让美国立法者改变体制的一次努力。

example.en: She turned away from the window lest anyone see them.
example.zh: 她转身离开窗边，免得有人看见他们。

example.en: the anti-foxhunting lobby
example.zh: 反对猎狐的游说团体

example.en: a luxurious 30-room villa
example.zh: 一栋有30个房间的豪华度假别墅

example.en: At the Sheffield arena, the speakers were magnified ten times on a giant screen.
example.zh: 在谢菲尔德体育馆，演讲者在一个巨大的屏幕上被放大了十倍。

example.en: the cost of repairs and maintenance
example.zh: 维修保养费

example.en: The Labour Party won a huge majority at the last general election.
example.zh: 工党在上次大选中以巨大的票数优势获胜。

example.en: In the winter I head for the mall.
example.zh: 在冬日里,我前往这个购物商场。

example.en: The shareholders have manifested their intention to sell the shares.
example.zh: 股东们表明了要出售股票的意图。

example.en: the company that manufactured the drug
example.zh: 生产这种药的公司

example.en: the enormous variety of marine life
example.zh: 海洋生物繁多的种类

example.en: The relations between our two countries have improved markedly in every aspect.
example.zh: 我们两国的关系在各方面都有了显著的发展。

example.en: a surgical face mask
example.zh: 外科手术口罩

example.en: curtain material
example.zh: 窗帘布

example.en: Problems were expected, but they never materialized.
example.zh: 估计会有问题，但一直没有发生。

example.en: If I have to stay late at work tonight, it won’t matter because we can go out another night.
example.zh: 如果今晚我必须工作到很晚的话，那也没关系，我们可以改天晚上再出去。

example.en: Beth shows a maturity way beyond her 16 years.
example.zh: 贝丝表现出一种远远超出她16岁年龄的成熟。

example.en: New safety measures were being demanded after last night’s horrific train crash.
example.zh: 昨晚发生严重的火车相撞事故后，民众要求制定新的安全措施。

phrases.zh: 市场机制；市场调节作用

example.en: the brake mechanism
example.zh: 刹车装置

phrases.zh: 溶解成；消散在…中；因心软而…

example.en: It was warmer now, and the snow was beginning to melt.
example.zh: 现在天气暖和了，雪开始融化。

example.en: I sent him a memo reminding him about the meeting.
example.zh: 我发给他一个通知，提醒他开会的事。

example.en: We want to make this a truly memorable day for the children.
example.zh: 我们想让今天成为孩子们永远难忘的日子。

example.en: Was my name mentioned at all?
example.zh: 我的名字被提到过吗？

phrases.zh: 根据事物本身的优缺点；按照事情的是非曲直
【法律】在诉讼中证明自己有理

example.en: The results have been encouraging enough to merit further investigation.
example.zh: 结果令人振奋，值得进一步调查研究。

example.en: People migrate to cities like Jakarta in search of work.
example.zh: 人们移居到雅加达这样的城市找工作。

example.en: He said the launch of the party represented a milestone in Zambian history.
example.zh: 他说该党的成立代表着赞比亚历史上的一个里程碑。

example.en: The storm caused only minimal damage.
example.zh: 暴风雨只造成了轻微破坏。

phrases.zh: 数据挖掘技术（即指从资料中发掘资讯或知识）

example.en: ...traditional industries such as coal mining and steel making.
example.zh: …像采煤和炼钢这样的传统工业。

example.en: We have made some minor changes to the program.
example.zh: 我们对那个程序做了一些小改动。

example.en: Gaelic is still spoken in Ireland by a tiny minority.
example.zh: 爱尔兰仍有极少数人在说盖尔语。

phrases.zh: 奇妙地；好得不可思议；好到惊人程度；完全地

example.en: It’s a miracle you weren’t killed!
example.zh: 你没有死真是奇迹！

example.en: It seems the banks always profit from farmers’ misfortunes.
example.zh: 银行似乎总是从农民的不幸中获益。

example.en: Some parts of the report could be misinterpreted.
example.zh: 报告的某些部分可能会被误解。

example.en: It improves the strength and mobility of joints.
example.zh: 它能提高关节的力量和灵活性。

example.en: They need more funds to modernize the country’s telephone system.
example.zh: 他们需要更多的资金将本国的电话系统现代化。

example.en: Make sure the soil is moist before planting the seeds.
example.zh: 播种之前要确保土壤湿润。

example.en: a monopoly in copper trading
example.zh: 对铜交易的垄断

phrases.zh: 婴儿死亡率，早期失效；早期故障期
产妇死亡率，母性死亡率；母死率

example.en: Mortality from heart disease varies widely across the world.
example.zh: 心脏病死亡率世界各地差异很大。

example.en: The gas station just neighbours to the motel.
example.zh: 加油站就在汽车旅馆的附近。

phrases.zh: 埃佛勒斯峰（喜马拉雅山主峰之一，中国称珠穆朗玛峰）

example.en: Tension here is mounting , as we await the final result.
example.zh: 我们等待着最终结果，这里的气氛也越来越紧张。

example.en: Hundreds of people gathered to mourn the slain president.
example.zh: 成百上千人聚集在一起悼念遇刺的总统。

example.en: the municipal waste dump
example.zh: 城市垃圾场

phrases.zh: [计]窄带，窄频带；[经]狭小汇率幅度

example.en: He narrowed his eyes and gazed at the horizon.
example.zh: 他眯起眼睛凝望着地平线。

phrases.zh: 不得已；必然地，不可避免地

example.en: I’m afraid it’s become a matter of economic necessity.
example.zh: 恐怕这已成了一个经济需求的问题。

example.en: a needy family
example.zh: 贫困家庭

phrases.zh: 玩忽职守；[法]失职；过失责任

example.en: She smoked and drank, neglected the children, and left the clothes unmended.
example.zh: 她抽烟喝酒，既不照顾孩子，也不缝补衣服。

phrases.zh: 商务谈判，商业谈判；交易磋商

example.en: The trader was obstinate in the negotiation.
example.zh: 这个商人在谈判中拗强固执。

example.en: What happened in the factory is being whispered about the neighborhood.
example.zh: 工厂里发生的事正在附近居民中私下传说。

example.en: Net neutrality, or not?
example.zh: 网络中立或不?

example.en: a recurring nightmare
example.zh: 一再出现的噩梦

example.en: This week one of them will be nominated by the Democratic Party for the presidency of the United States.
example.zh: 本周他们中的一人将被民主党提名为美国总统职位的候选人。

example.en: She had no notion what he meant.
example.zh: 她根本不明白他是什么意思。

example.en: Wholemeal bread is more nutritious than white bread.
example.zh: 全麦面包比白面包更有营养。

example.en: So, what of the future of obesity in America?
example.zh: 那么，未来美国的肥胖状况会怎么发展呢？

example.en: He vowed to achieve certain objectives before the end of his presidency.
example.zh: 他立誓要在他的总统任期结束之前实现某些目标。

example.en: The storm got worse and worse. Finally, I was obliged to abandon the car and continue on foot.
example.zh: 暴风雨越来越猛烈。最终，我被迫弃车徒步前行。

example.en: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.
example.zh: 这项税收为想在海外发展贸易的公司设置了障碍。

example.en: A third of accidental deaths occur in the home.
example.zh: 有三分之一的意外死亡发生在家里。

phrases.zh: 犯罪行为，犯罪；刑事犯罪

example.en: His words gave great offense to everybody present.
example.zh: 他的发言冲犯了在场的所有人。

example.en: Congress is continuing to oppose the President’s health care budget.
example.zh: 国会继续反对总统的医疗保健预算。

phrases.zh: 二元对立；二项对立；相对关系

example.en: He is confident in his ability to overcome all opposition with his personal charm.
example.zh: 他自信有能力以个人魅力来化解一切反对力量。

example.en: Andrew took a more optimistic view.
example.zh: 安德鲁抱有更为乐观的想法。

phrases.zh: 有机质；有机物；有机物质

example.en: Organic farming is better for the environment.
example.zh: 有机耕作对环境更有利。

example.en: She looked at the street names, trying to orient herself.
example.zh: 她看看街名，试图确定自己的方位。

example.en: People who had heard the evidence at the trial were surprised at the outcome.
example.zh: 在审判过程中听过证词的人都对此结果感到吃惊。

example.en: outdated teaching methods
example.zh: 不合时宜的教学方法

example.en: She outlived her husband by 20 years.
example.zh: 她比她丈夫多活了20年。

example.en: Flats outnumber houses in this area.
example.zh: 这个地区公寓房比独栋房子多。

example.en: ...companies that outsource IT functions.
example.zh: …将信息技术方面的工作外包的公司。

example.en: The advantages of this deal largely outweigh the disadvantages.
example.zh: 这笔交易的利远大于弊。

example.en: Sometimes, they overcharge or don’t build those parts I have been paying for.
example.zh: 有时，他们收费过高或者要不给我修我一直在给钱的那些零部件。

example.en: Some of the boys became overexcited.
example.zh: 有些男孩变得兴奋过度了。

example.en: But the various pros and cons should not blindly overwhelm one another.
example.zh: 但是，众多的利弊得失不应盲目的一个压倒另一个。

example.en: How much do I owe you (= often used to show that you want to pay for something )?
example.zh: 我该付你多少钱？

example.en: Some of the more extreme contacts give you "cat eyes" or how about "owl eyes"?
example.zh: 一些更酷的隐形眼镜可以给你一双"猫眼"或者是"猫头鹰的眼睛"。

example.en: Her face distorted in panic.
example.zh: 她的脸因恐慌而变相了。

example.en: The Koran describes paradise as a place containing a garden of delight.
example.zh: 《古兰经》把天堂描绘成一个拥有快乐花园的地方。

example.en: You can bet that would truly paralyze the flow of credit: Does anyone believe Washington can manage banks?
example.zh: 你可以打赌，这会使流动的信贷真正限于瘫痪：真有人相信华盛顿可以经营银行吗？

example.en: large areas of rough upland pasture
example.zh: 大片起伏的山地牧场

phrases.zh: 流型，流动型态；活动模；流线谱

example.en: Weather patterns have changed in recent years.
example.zh: 气候模式近年已经发生了变化。

phrases.zh: 踌躇；停下来好好想一想

example.en: There was a pause while Alice changed the tape.
example.zh: 艾丽斯换磁带的时候出现了短暂的停顿。

phrases.zh: 为…做好准备；为…铺平道路

example.en: a paved courtyard
example.zh: 地面铺砌过的院子

example.en: the annual payroll was $88 million
example.zh: 年度工资总支出为8,800万美元

phrases.zh: n. 旧时美国南部的黑奴制度

example.en: There was a peculiar smell in the kitchen.
example.zh: 厨房里有一股怪味。

example.en: No littering. Penalty $500.
example.zh: 禁止乱扔垃圾。 违者罚款500美元。

phrases.zh: 公积金计划；退休金办法；养老计划

example.en: At what age can you start drawing your pension ?
example.zh: 从多少岁可以开始领取养老金？

example.en: Hundreds perished when the ship went down.
example.zh: 轮船沉没，数百人罹难。

example.en: the artist’s use of perspective
example.zh: 那位画家对透视法的运用

example.en: Don’t be such a pessimist!
example.zh: 别这么悲观！

example.en: Homelessness is not a new phenomenon .
example.zh: 无家可归已不是什么新现象。

example.en: Plato, Aristotle, and other Greek philosophers
example.zh: 柏拉图、亚里士多德和其他希腊哲学家

phrases.zh: 划分；分配；描绘，提出…纲要

example.en: The plot was a little confusing.
example.zh: 情节有些费解。

example.en: He reads a lot of poetry.
example.zh: 他大量阅读诗歌。

phrases.zh: 极坐标；极座标；极坐标系统

example.en: Well, what is the equation of this circle in polar coordinates?
example.zh: 那么，这个圆方程在极坐标系下相当于什么呢？

example.en: A recent poll found that 80% of Californians support the governor.
example.zh: 最近的一项民意调查发现80%的加利福尼亚人支持州长。

example.en: He continued to ponder the problem as he walked home.
example.zh: 他一边往家走一边继续思考那个问题。

phrases.zh: 把(食品、土地、财产等)分成几份；把某物分成若干份；按比例分配

example.en: Damage was confined to a small portion of the castle.
example.zh: 城堡仅有一小部分受到了损坏。

phrases.zh: 构成威胁；形成一种威胁

example.en: Rising unemployment is posing serious problems for the administration.
example.zh: 失业率上升正在给政府造成严重的问题。

phrases.zh: 就位；在适当的位置；在原位

example.en: Position the cursor before the letter you want to delete.
example.zh: 把光标放在你想删去的字母之前。

example.en: That information is not in our possession.
example.zh: 那则信息不归我们所有。

phrases.zh: [经]市场潜力；市场潜在需求量

example.en: The company has identified 60 potential customers.
example.zh: 该公司已确定了60位潜在的客户。

example.en: a potentially dangerous situation
example.zh: 有潜在危险的局势

phrases.zh: 实务经验，实践经验，实际经验

example.en: Candidates should have training and practical experience in basic electronics.
example.zh: 应征者应该具备基础电子学方面的培训和实践经验。

example.en: a legal precedent
example.zh: 判例

phrases.zh: 精密加工；精密机械加工

example.en: The choir sang with precision.
example.zh: 合唱团的演唱准确无误。

example.en: Sales were five percent lower than predicted.
example.zh: 销售额比预期低5%。

example.en: The landscape has remained predominantly rural in appearance.
example.zh: 该风景看上去主要保留了乡村风貌。

example.en: Do you have a colour preference ?
example.zh: 你有什么颜色上的偏好吗？

example.en: Am I suggesting that we should return to the preindustrial mode of production or to nineteenth-century "free enterprise" capitalism?
example.zh: 我是否在建议我们应回到工业化前的生产模式或回到十九世纪"自由企业"资本主义时期呢？

example.en: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
example.zh: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

phrases.zh: 溢价；非常珍贵；在票面价值以上
风险溢价；风险酬金；风险报酬

example.en: The physician examines the patient then diagnoses the disease and prescribes medication.
example.zh: 内科医生检查了病人，然后对疾病作出诊断，并开出药方。

example.en: She was presented with an award .
example.zh: 她被授予一个奖项。

phrases.zh: 口头报告；口头陈述；口头演讲
n. 演讲技巧；表达技巧

example.en: James Watson, Philip Mayo and I gave a slide and video presentation.
example.zh: 詹姆斯·沃森、菲利普·梅奥和我一起做了一场有幻灯和录像片的讲座。

example.en: Roosevelt was elected four times to the presidency of the US.
example.zh: 罗斯福四次当选美国总统。

example.en: The king wanted to enhance his prestige through war.
example.zh: 国王想通过战争来提高自己的威信。

example.en: She has a teenage daughter from a previous marriage.
example.zh: 她有个出自前一次婚姻的十几岁的女儿。

translations.text: 无价的，难以用价格衡量的

example.en: priceless antiques
example.zh: 极其贵重的古董

example.en: a primitive society
example.zh: 原始社会

example.en: Schools try to teach children a set of principles.
example.zh: 学校设法教给孩子们一套道德准则。

phrases.zh: 事先批准；预先审批；事前批准；事前许可；预先核准

example.en: You do not need any prior knowledge of the subject.
example.zh: 你无需事先具备该方面的知识。

example.en: Morris has a private jet.
example.zh: 莫里斯拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

phrases.zh: 民事诉讼；民事诉讼法；民事诉讼程序

example.en: On board, we were given the usual talk on safety procedures (= what to do if an accident happens, or to prevent an accident ) .
example.zh: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

phrases.zh: 初级生产力；第一性生产力；基础生产力；初级生产率

example.en: high productivity levels in manufacturing
example.zh: 制造业中的高生产率

example.en: The advertising campaign proved very profitable.
example.zh: 事实证明，这次广告宣传活动卓有成效。

example.en: a profound sense of guilt
example.zh: 强烈的内疚感

example.en: prolonged exposure to the sun
example.zh: 长时间暴露在阳光下

example.en: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.
example.zh: 你们没有必要牺牲环保来促进经济增长。

example.en: a winter sales promotion
example.zh: 冬季促销活动

example.en: Japan's recession has prompted consumers to cut back on buying cars.
example.zh: 日本的经济衰退已促使消费者们削减购车花销。

phrases.zh: 物业管理；资产管理；物业管理专员

example.en: The hotel is not responsible for any loss or damage to guests’ personal property .
example.zh: 宾馆对住客个人财物的丢失和损坏概不负责。

phrases.zh: 推荐某人(参加某组织)；提名某人(任某职)

example.en: the changes currently proposed by the local planning authorities
example.zh: 目前由地方规划局提议的改革

phrases.zh: 光明的前景，辉煌的前程

example.en: I had no job, no education, and no prospects .
example.zh: 我没有工作，没受过什么教育，前途渺茫。

example.en: a time of economic prosperity
example.zh: 经济繁荣时期

example.en: Much advance publicity was given to the talks.
example.zh: 会谈之前做了大量的宣传。

example.en: television’s failure to publicize the unemployment issue
example.zh: 电视未能报道失业问题

example.en: She paid for her purchases and left.
example.zh: 她付钱买好东西离开了。

example.en: She plans to pursue a career in politics.
example.zh: 她计划从政。

phrases.zh: n. 七巧板；智力拼图玩具

example.en: a puzzling fact
example.zh: 令人费解的情况

example.en: A clearly quantifiable measure of quality is not necessary.
example.zh: 一种确切的可计量的质量检测是不必要的。

phrases.zh: 资格考试；合格试验；质量鉴定试验

example.en: He left school without any qualifications.
example.zh: 他离校时没有拿到任何文凭。

example.en: Free school lunches are given to children who qualify.
example.zh: 符合条件的儿童可获得免费的学生午餐。

example.en: Your work has improved in quantity and quality this term.
example.zh: 这学期你的作业在完成数量和质量上都有提高。

example.en: Ray glanced at his watch and quickened his pace (= began to walk faster ).
example.zh: 雷瞥了一眼手表，加快了步伐。

phrases.zh: n. 配额制；定额分配制

example.en: The government has decided to scrap quotas on car imports.
example.zh: 政府决定取消汽车进口配额。

example.en: He quoted a short passage from the Bible.
example.zh: 他引用了《圣经》里的一小段。

phrases.zh: 赛前动员会，鼓舞士气的集会

example.en: About 1,000 people attended the rally in Hyde Park.
example.zh: 大约有1,000人参加了海德公园的集会。

example.en: They throw out all of these behaviors randomly.
example.zh: 它们的这些行为都是随机的。

example.en: There were several pairs of riding boots ranked neatly in the hall.
example.zh: 门厅里整齐地摆放着几双马靴。

example.en: Police are investigating a series of violent rapes in the town.
example.zh: 警察在调查镇上发生的一连串暴力强奸案。

example.en: This species of plant is becoming increasingly rare.
example.zh: 这种植物越来越罕见。

example.en: $20 an hour is the going rate (= the usual amount paid ) for private tuition.
example.zh: 每小时20美元是私人授课的一般收费。

example.en: the spiritual realm
example.zh: 精神领域

example.en: The peasants leaned down to reap wheat.
example.zh: 农民们俯身收割小麦。

example.en: You don’t happen to recall his name, do you?
example.zh: 你不会恰巧还想得起他的名字吧？

example.en: She was unsure of her reception after everything that had happened.
example.zh: 发生了这些事后，她对自己是否还受欢迎没把握。

example.en: a recipe book
example.zh: 一本烹饪书

example.en: He was accused of causing death by reckless driving .
example.zh: 他被控因鲁莽驾驶致人死亡。

phrases.zh: 处理；对付；和…算帐；预料到

example.en: ‘There’s nothing we can do about it.’ ‘You reckon (= used to express doubt or disagreement ) ?’
example.zh: “这件事我们无能为力。”“是吗？”

example.en: The possibility remains that the two theories may be reconciled.
example.zh: 这两种理论仍是有可能协调的。

example.en: We’re having difficulty recruiting enough qualified staff.
example.zh: 我们难以招聘到足够的合格职员。

phrases.zh: 递推公式；递归公式；循环公式
重现期，重复周期；脉冲周期

example.en: Police are out in force to prevent a recurrence of the violence.
example.zh: 警察大规模地行动防止暴力的再次发生。

phrases.zh: 仔细考虑，思考；反省；回想，回顾；怀疑

example.en: The drop in consumer spending reflects concern about the economy.
example.zh: 消费支出的下降反映出人们对经济的担忧。

translations.text: 深思熟虑的；反映的，反射的

example.en: Stick reflective tape on your school bag.
example.zh: 给你的书包贴上反光带。

example.en: It made a refreshing change to talk to someone new.
example.zh: 和刚认识的人谈话感觉很新鲜。

example.en: The family never quite regained its former influence.
example.zh: 这个家族再也没有恢复往昔的影响力。

example.en: Student registration (= for a course of study ) starts the first week in September.
example.zh: 学生注册在9月份的第一个星期开始。

phrases.zh: 政府法规，政府调控；政府监管

example.en: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
example.zh: 如今好像条条框框很多。

example.en: The film reinforces the idea that women should be pretty and dumb.
example.zh: 这部影片强化了这个观点——女人要漂亮，而且要笨一些。

example.en: Police arrested several men, who were later released.
example.zh: 警察逮捕了几个人，后来都释放了。

example.en: Relevant documents were presented in court.
example.zh: 法庭上出示了相关的文件。

example.en: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable
example.zh: 既便宜又可靠的避孕方法

example.en: Drugs helped to relieve the pain.
example.zh: 药物有助于舒缓疼痛。

example.en: A relieved smile spread over his face.
example.zh: 他脸上绽开了宽慰的笑容。

example.en: Wells finally agreed, but with reluctance.
example.zh: 韦尔斯最终同意了，但很勉强。

example.en: She has made remarkable progress.
example.zh: 她取得了显著的进步。

phrases.zh:
[戏谑语]挪动挪动;走开,离开：

She removed herself reluctantly.
她勉强地走开了。

example.en: a cleaner that will remove wine stains
example.zh: 可去除葡萄酒酒渍的清洁剂

example.en: Our old car is badly in need of replacement.
example.zh: 我们的旧车急需更换。

example.en: a union representative
example.zh: 工会代表

example.en: Scientists studied the reproduction, diet, and health of the dolphins.
example.zh: 科学家研究了海豚的繁殖情况、进食规律和健康状况。

example.en: a dinner reservation
example.zh: 预订晚餐

example.en: As one local resident put it in May, "By day there is government.
example.zh: 正如一位当地居民在五月份对它的描述”白天有政府。

example.en: A hospital administrator has resigned over claims he lied to get the job.
example.zh: 一位医院主管因为有人声称他的职位是骗来的而辞职了。

phrases.zh: 人见人爱；无法抗拒；惹人喜爱

example.en: He was charged with trying to resist arrest .
example.zh: 他被指控企图拒捕。

example.en: resolute opposition
example.zh: 坚决的反对

example.en: Lagoon Reef is one of the best resort hotels.
example.zh: 潟湖礁是最好的度假酒店之一。

example.en: We all went back to our respective homes to wait for news.
example.zh: 我们都各自回家等待消息。

example.en: Kelly’s promotion means more money and more responsibility.
example.zh: 凯利获得提升，这意味着钱多了，责任也更大了。

example.en: a car with highly responsive steering
example.zh: 方向盘操纵灵活的汽车

example.en: The new law restricts the sale of hand guns.
example.zh: 新法规限制手枪的销售。

example.en: Don't push for an interview on the spot, but rather explain that you want to let them know of your interest, drop off your resume, and complete an application while you're there if possible.
example.zh: 这个时候不要急着想得到面试，而是解释为你只是想让他们知道你对他们招聘的职位有兴趣，放下你的简历，然后有可能的话填完一份申请表就离开吧。

example.en: Furniture and carpet retailers are among those reporting the sharpest annual decline in sales.
example.zh: 家具和地毯零售商们是在那些报告最大年销售下滑的商家之中。

example.en: an annual reunion
example.zh: 一年一度的聚会

phrases.zh: 显示全部（计算机操作命令）

example.en: He may be prosecuted for revealing secrets about the security agency.
example.zh: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

example.en: advertising revenue
example.zh: 广告收入

phrases.zh: adv. 相反，向相反方向，倒（退），逆（行、转等）

example.en: The results were read out in reverse order (= with the worst first and the best last ) .
example.zh: 成绩是按逆序宣读的。

example.en: Local people have decided to revive this centuries-old tradition.
example.zh: 当地人决定复兴这一延续了数个世纪的传统。

example.en: New technology is going to revolutionize everything we do.
example.zh: 新科技将彻底改变我们做的每一件事。

phrases.zh: 作为…的报酬；作为…的回报

example.en: Teaching can be a very rewarding career.
example.zh: 教书可以是一种很有意义的职业。

example.en: That’s a ridiculous idea!
example.zh: 那主意很荒唐！

example.en: a rigorous analysis of defence needs
example.zh: 对国防需求的缜密分析

example.en: ancient pagan rituals
example.zh: 古老的异教仪式

example.en: Police are investigating a series of bank robberies in South Wales.
example.zh: 警方正在调查发生在南威尔士的连环银行抢劫案。

phrases.zh: 浪漫主义运动（十八世纪末及十九世纪初西欧掀起的文学艺术运动）

example.zh: 我只是耸耸肩，没有理睬他。

example.zh: 我决定跳过第一章。

example.zh: 我的讯息是，“你若企图走私毒品，那是犯傻。”

example.zh: 湖水冻得结结实实。

phrases.zh: 在不断变化中；动摇不定；在溶解状态中

example.zh: 最好的解决方法是他们分开。

example.zh: 露西把宝宝抱在怀里摇晃着，让他安静下来。

example.zh: 这些螺栓符合所有的工程设计规格。

example.zh: 海滩上一个安静的好地方

example.zh: 几百年前始于欧洲的工业革命现在正向全世界扩散。

example.zh: 我们在肮脏的环境里住了一年半。

example.zh: 统一英语拼写的尝试从未成功过。

example.zh: 抱歉，我不是故意吓你一跳的。

example.zh: 接下来的五个月中，他们每个人都劝阻我不要做股票经纪人。

example.zh: 在这个示例中，我们将使用所有方法中最直截了当的一种 — 将对象引用写入一个文件，该 文件将由客户机选取。

◎使劲拉某物；使劲做某事；努力争取

example.en: These four posts take the strain of the whole structure.
example.zh: 这四根柱子承受着整个结构的压力。

example.zh: 政府的长期经济策略

example.zh: 这将会减少流浪狗在这一区域的数量。

example.zh: 克劳福德强调市中心需要建更多的住宅。

example.en: The government has promised that the army will be called in to help if there is a firemen’s strike.
example.zh: 政府承诺，如消防员罢工，就将调军队来协助。

example.zh: 他们昨天向财政大臣提交了他们的报告。

example.zh: 欧洲的农场主们正在策划一场反对削减农场补贴的大游行。

example.zh: 她非常怀疑他在对她撒谎。

example.zh: 他不愿回答我的问题，这引起我的怀疑。

example.zh: 一个有同情心的朋友

example.zh: 精神分裂症最常见的症状之一是幻听。

example.zh: 要抵挡住购买的诱惑，除非你确有需要。

example.zh: 你的那些威胁吓不倒我。

example.zh: 邮政工人威胁如果不加薪，他们就要罢工。

example.zh: 桑德海姆的这本书研究了男女关系性质的变化。

example.zh: 警方一直在中美洲到处追捕这四名罪犯。

example.zh: 悲剧发生在他们夜里外出归来的路上。

example.en: The locals were encouraged to trap and kill mice to stop the spread of the virus.
example.zh: 当地人被鼓励用捕捉器捕杀老鼠以阻止病毒的传播。

example.zh: 当前的趋势是雇用更多的兼职人员。

example.zh: 我不得不上数学补习课。

example.zh: …一只宠物龟。

example.zh: 他是由家庭教师教的。

example.zh: 她的双手开始拧她拎着的那个包的拎柄。

example.zh: 现在我的前途似乎是个未知数。

example.zh: 大学毕业后她仍无法决定自己要追求什么事业。

example.zh: 我们谁都不应低估妇女在职业发展中所面临的困难程度。

example.zh: 数年来我们一直在讲食品及药物管理局经费不足。

example.en: To stop a problem you have to understand its underlying causes.
example.zh: 要解决问题，你得了解其潜在原因。

example.en: He undertook to pay the money back in six months.
example.zh: 他保证在六个月之内还钱。

example.en: Starting a new business can be a risky undertaking.
example.zh: 创办新企业有时是一件有风险的事情。

example.en: The place is rife with smugglers, dealers, undocumented immigrants, and slaves.
example.zh: 这里到处都是走私者、交易商、无证移民甚至奴隶。

example.zh: 不道德的医疗行为

example.zh: 她小心翼翼地从凹凸不平的地面上走回来。

example.en: The experiment produced some unexpected results.
example.zh: 这次试验产生了一些意想不到的结果。

example.en: a unified approach
example.zh: 统一的方法

example.en: Such a move is rare, but not unprecedented.
example.zh: 这样的举动少见，但并非从来没有过。

example.zh: 有些家长对老师抱着完全不切实际的期望。

example.en: The political situation is still very unstable.
example.zh: 政局依然非常动荡。

example.zh: 帮助无家可归者的不懈努力

example.en: I think he is shallow, vain and untrustworthy.
example.zh: 我觉得他肤浅、虚荣，并不值得信赖。

example.en: unemployment in urban areas
example.zh: 城市地区的失业状况

example.en: Much of this, she says, is due to increased urbanization.
example.zh: 而这些，主要是由于不断增加的都市化造成的。

example.en: The charity urged quick action.
example.zh: 慈善机构敦促迅速采取行动。

example.en: He was in urgent need of medical attention.
example.zh: 他急需治疗。

example.en: For someone to realize the value of information, you need to organize data to permit rapid discovery and utilization.
example.zh: 要使某人实现信息的价值，您需要相应地组织数据以允许快速的发现和利用。

example.en: So that satisfies the definition of validity.
example.zh: 所以这满足了有效性的定义。

phrases.zh: 变异系数；变动系数；变更系数

example.zh: 他的大部分诗作都是有关爱情主题的形式不同的作品。

phrases.zh: 在……方面变化；在……方面有差异

example.en: Quentin’s mood seems to vary according to the weather.
example.zh: 昆廷的情绪似乎随天气而变化。

example.en: Our youngest daughter is a vegetarian.
example.zh: 我们的小女儿是个素食主义者。

example.en: a description of the stolen vehicle
example.zh: 对被盗车辆的描述

example.en: a burst blood vessel
example.zh: 破裂的血管

phrases.zh: 成为…的牺牲品；成为…的受害者；屈服于…；被…降服

example.en: The victim received head injuries from which she died a week later.
example.zh: 受害人头部受伤，一周后死亡。

phrases.zh: 在视野范围内；在考虑中的；作为目标

example.en: an opportunity to view the film before it goes on general release
example.zh: 在影片公映之前观影的机会

example.en: Different viewpoints produce different images.
example.zh: 角度不同，产生的画面也不同。

example.en: human rights violations
example.zh: 违反人权

example.en: the increase in violent crime
example.zh: 暴力犯罪的增多

example.en: The website allows you to take a virtual tour of the art gallery.
example.zh: 这个网站可让你对美术馆作一番虚拟参观。

example.en: Virtually all the children come to school by bus.
example.zh: 几乎所有的孩子都乘公交车上学。

phrases.zh: 乙型肝炎病毒；[病毒学]B型肝炎病毒

example.en: children infected with the Aids virus
example.zh: 感染艾滋病病毒的儿童

phrases.zh: 维生素E；生育酚；抗不育维生素
维生素D（抗佝偻病维生素）；钙化醇

example.en: If you give your child a vitamin, perhaps you should stick with this classic.
example.zh: 如果你给你的孩子服用一种维他命，可能你需要坚持这一个原则。

translations.text: 脆弱的, 易受影响的

example.en: He took advantage of me when I was at my most vulnerable.
example.zh: 他在我最脆弱的时候利用了我。

phrases.zh: 社会福利；社会福利工作（等于social work）
公共福利，公用福利设施；社会福利

example.en: Our only concern is the children’s welfare.
example.zh: 我们唯一关心的是孩子们的幸福。

example.en: the widespread use of chemicals in agriculture
example.zh: 化学品在农业中的广泛使用

phrases.zh: v. 象野火般迅速传播；迅速传播

example.en: ...a wildfire in Montana that's already burned thousands of acres of rich grassland.
example.zh: ...已经烧毁几千英亩肥沃草地的蒙大拿州野火。

example.en: measures to protect the area’s wildlife
example.zh: 保护该地区野生生物的措施

phrases.zh: n. 如意算盘；痴心妄想

example.en: Stop your wishful thinking and be glad for what you do have instead of always wanting more.
example.zh: 别再一厢情愿的妄想了，高高兴兴的接受你已经有的，别再奢求更多了。

example.en: What are they going to do now, I wonder ?
example.zh: 我想知道，他们现在打算怎么办呢？
