example.zh: 她在努力应付繁重的工作量。

phrases.zh: 屈服强度；屈变力；抗屈强度

example.en: Our research has only recently begun to yield important results.
example.zh: 直到最近我们的研究才开始取得重要成果。

example.en: The female deposits her eggs directly into the water.
example.zh: 雌性把卵直接产在水中。

example.en: You tell the receptionist that you are expecting a call from this client and to put them through.
example.zh: 你告诉传达员你正在等待一个来自这个客户的电话，并允许将他们接进来。

phrases.zh: 粒径；颗粒直径，粒子直径

example.en: dust particles
example.zh: 尘埃

example.en: Will these finds furnish more information on prehistoric man?
example.zh: 这些发现是否能提供更多有关史前人类的资料？

example.en: He elaborately devised a new computer.
example.zh: 他精心设计了一台新电脑。

example.en: infectious diseases
example.zh: 传染性疾病

example.en: How did they diagnose you?
example.zh: 他们怎么给你的诊断的？

example.en: She has gone from being a healthy, fit, and sporty young woman to being a cripple.
example.zh: 她从一个健康、强壮、爱好体育运动的年轻姑娘变成了一个残疾人。

example.en: Jim’s voice became aggressive.
example.zh: 吉姆的声音凶了起来。

example.en: The aptly named Skyline Restaurant provides spectacular views of the city below.
example.zh: 天际餐厅名副其实，可以俯瞰城市美景。

example.en: There is every sign that new Asian-Americans are just as willing to assimilate.
example.zh: 各种迹象表明新的亚裔美籍人简直一样愿意被同化。

example.en: She’s the team’s most consistent player.
example.zh: 她是该队中表现最为稳定的选手。

example.en: Sales of the drug will be suspended until more tests are completed.
example.zh: 这种药品在完成进一步检验之前将暂停销售。

example.en: They suppress the ingenuity of our people and businesses.
example.zh: 它们抑制我们的人民和企业的创造力。

example.en: He was unemotional, quiet, and reserved.
example.zh: 他不动感情、安静而矜持。

phrases.zh: 不偏估计，公正（无偏）评价

example.en: We aim to provide a service that is balanced and unbiased.
example.zh: 我们的目标是提供一种公平公正的服务。

phrases.zh: 废物处理；废物处理装置
任意使用；任你自由支配；听你差遣

example.en: bomb disposal experts
example.zh: 拆弹专家

example.en: I felt very inferior among all those academics.
example.zh: 与那些大学教师在一起，我自惭形秽。

example.en: The patient’s condition has now stabilized.
example.zh: 病人的情况现已稳定下来了。

example.en: a bleak January afternoon
example.zh: 一月里一个阴冷的下午

example.en: Adam’s smile sent her spirits soaring .
example.zh: 亚当的微笑让她飘飘然了。

example.en: There are grounds for cautious optimism.
example.zh: 有理由保持谨慎乐观。

example.en: He was young and full of ambition.
example.zh: 他年轻，而且雄心勃勃。

phrases.zh: 实际的方法；重实效的方法

example.en: Williams took a more pragmatic approach to management problems.
example.zh: 威廉斯在管理问题上采用的是一种更务实的做法。

example.en: She admitted that she was unable to compromise.
example.zh: 她承认自己无法作出妥协。

example.en: the perpetual snows of the mountaintops
example.zh: 山顶的终年积雪

example.en: Part-time workers are considered dispensable.
example.zh: 兼职工作人员被认为是可有可无的。

example.en: a case of robbery and assault
example.zh: 一宗抢劫袭击案

example.en: The desire for peace transcended political differences.
example.zh: 对和平的渴望超越了政治分歧。

example.en: Every business has its own inherent risks.
example.zh: 每笔生意本身都有风险。

example.en: The question baffled me completely.
example.zh: 这个问题把我彻底难倒了。

example.en: Remove stains by soaking in a mild solution of bleach.
example.zh: 用温和的漂白溶液浸泡以去除污渍。

example.en: American children did less well in math than their peers in Japan.
example.zh: 美国儿童的数学成绩不如日本的同龄儿童。

example.en: The town was isolated by the floods.
example.zh: 洪水使该镇与外界隔绝。

example.en: The abolition of slavery in Brazil and the Caribbean closely followed the pattern of the United States.
example.zh: 巴西和加勒比海地区对奴隶制的废除很大程度上遵循了美国的模式。

example.en: attempts to abolish slavery
example.zh: 废除奴隶制的努力

example.en: They write all their own scripts.
example.zh: 他们所有的剧本都是自己写的。

example.en: Unfortunately, parts of the original manuscript have been lost.
example.zh: 遗憾的是，部分原始手稿丢失了。

example.en: The study found that some alcoholics had clear personality traits showing up early in childhood.
example.zh: 这项研究发现一些酗酒者早在孩童时就表现出明显的个性特征。

example.en: They stopped you as soon as you deviated from the script.
example.zh: 你一偏离剧本，他们就会叫停。

example.en: There is overwhelming evidence that smoking damages your health.
example.zh: 有难以辩驳的证据表明吸烟有损健康。

example.en: I tried to visualize the house while he was describing it.
example.zh: 我一边听他描述，一边想象那房子的样子。

example.en: He tapped the table nervously with his fingers.
example.zh: 他紧张地用手指轻轻地敲打桌子。

example.en: Please extinguish all cigarettes.
example.zh: 请把香烟都熄灭了。

example.en: fumes from a toxic waste dump
example.zh: 有毒废料堆产生的毒气

example.en: Most postdoctoral work is funded by the research councils.
example.zh: 大部分的博士后的工作都是由研究会资助的。

example.en: I recommend the butter chicken - it’s delicious.
example.zh: 我推荐黄油焗鸡，非常好吃。

example.en: They retired to another room for private consultation.
example.zh: 他们退到另一房间秘密磋商。

example.en: Investigators are still trying to determine the cause of the fire.
example.zh: 调查人员仍在设法弄清失火的原因。

phrases.zh: 机密数据；保密资料；机密资料

example.en: a confidential government report
example.zh: 一份机密的政府报告

example.en: Languages are an essential part of the school curriculum.
example.zh: 语言是学校课程中必不可少的部分。

example.en: the school cafeteria
example.zh: 学校餐厅

phrases.zh: 未准备好；失去平衡；健康情况不佳

example.en: Pete was trimming the lawn around the roses.
example.zh: 皮特在修剪玫瑰丛周围的草坪。

example.en: More than five-thousand high school students have been expelled for cheating.
example.zh: 五千多名中学生因考试作弊而被开除。

example.en: Oil is refined to remove naturally occurring impurities.
example.zh: 油经过提炼去除天然生成的杂质。

example.en: More people commit suicide at Christmas than at any other time.
example.zh: 圣诞节期间自杀的人比其他任何时候都多。

example.en: People in manual occupations have a lower life expectancy.
example.zh: 干体力活的人预期寿命较短。

example.en: The files are arranged in alphabetical order .
example.zh: 这些文件按字母顺序排列。

example.en: The roses bloom every few days.
example.zh: 玫瑰每隔几天开花。

phrases.zh: 有机肥；有机肥料；有机质

example.en: ...farming without any purchased chemical, fertilizer or pesticide.
example.zh: …不使用任何购买的化学品、肥料或杀虫剂的耕作。

example.en: There are new tractors and new ploughs in the machinery lot.
example.zh: 机器设备场里有新拖拉机和新耕犁。

example.en: He wanted to affiliate with a U.S. firm because he needed expert advice in legal affairs.
example.zh: 他想成为一家美国公司的会员，因为他需要法律事务方面的专家意见。

example.en: the disposal of hazardous waste
example.zh: 有害废弃物的处理

example.en: modern methods of instantaneous communication
example.zh: 现代的即时通信方法

phrases.zh: 特性粘度；固有粘度；本征粘度

example.en: the intrinsic interest of the subject
example.zh: 该话题本身的趣味

example.en: The paradox is that fishermen would catch more fish if they fished less.
example.zh: 悖论就是: 如果渔夫减少捕鱼，反而会打到更多的鱼。

example.en: Our grateful thanks go to all who participated.
example.zh: 我们衷心感谢所有参与者。

example.en: The feedback will be used to modify the course for next year.
example.zh: 这些反馈意见将用于修改明年的课程。

phrases.zh: 知情同意，知会同意；知后同意

example.en: The chairman was elected by common consent (= with most people agreeing ) .
example.zh: 主席是大家一致推选出来的。

phrases.zh: n. 良知；直觉的知识，直观知识

example.en: He seemed to have an intuitive awareness of how I felt.
example.zh: 他好像凭直觉就知道我的感受。

example.en: Workers have erected scaffolding around the base of the tower below the roadway.
example.zh: 工人们已经在车行道下的塔基四周竖起了脚手架。

example.en: Stocks generally outperform other investments.
example.zh: 股票总体上要优于其他投资。

example.en: You need a long series of data to be able to discern such a trend.
example.zh: 你需要一大串数据才能认清这一趋势。

example.en: The dispute culminated last week in a lawsuit against the government.
example.zh: 这场针对政府诉讼案的争论在上星期达到了高潮。

example.en: Goodwin tried to have the court ruling overturned.
example.zh: 古德温试图推翻法院的裁决。

example.en: Some of the rooms were designated as offices.
example.zh: 其中一些房间是被指定用作办公室的。

example.en: There should be no suggestion of endorsement of the product or the company by WHO.
example.zh: 世卫组织不得对任何产品或公司提供支持建议。

example.en: a tasteless outfit
example.zh: 一套没有品位的衣服

example.en: I think that’s a brilliant idea .
example.zh: 我觉得那是个绝妙的主意。

example.en: our new range of fabrics and wallpapers
example.zh: 我们新的织物和墙纸系列

example.en: vocational qualifications
example.zh: 职业资格

example.en: The carpentry and soldier demand constraints are similar.
example.zh: 木工和士兵的需求约束是类似的。

example.en: Ventilate the room properly when stripping paint.
example.zh: 在刮漆的时候要适当地使房间通风。

example.en: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.
example.zh: 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

example.en: The work was tiring and tedious.
example.zh: 这工作既累人又枯燥。

example.en: After deductions for tax etc, your salary is about £700 a month.
example.zh: 扣除税款等之后，你的月薪大约有700英镑。

example.en: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
example.zh: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

example.en: If they have multiple test cases that will be run on the same platforms, they can select multiple configurations simultaneously and apply the configurations to several of them in batch mode.
example.zh: 如果他们拥有多个将要运行在同一个平台上的测试用例的话，那么他们能够同时选择多个配置，并且将这些配置批量应用到平台上。

example.en: traditional rural crafts
example.zh: 传统的乡村手工艺

example.en: The new airport will facilitate the development of tourism.
example.zh: 新机场将促进旅游业的发展。

example.en: Ethel’s health has deteriorated.
example.zh: 埃塞尔的健康状况恶化了。

example.en: Their departure was hastened by an abnormally cold winter.
example.zh: 那个冬天异常寒冷，所以他们提前走了。

phrases.zh: 妇女解放运动，女权运动

example.en: They pant after liberation.
example.zh: 他们渴望解放。

example.en: The quarterback sprinted toward the end zone with Jansen in hot pursuit (= following closely behind ) .
example.zh: 那名四分卫快速冲向底线区，詹森穷追不舍。

example.en: He was bemoaning the fact that lawyers charge so much.
example.zh: 他抱怨律师收费太高。

example.en: Animals have evolved camouflage to protect themselves from predators.
example.zh: 动物进化形成了伪装，以保护自身不被捕食性动物所捕食。

example.en: She can speak English fluently.
example.zh: 她能流利地说英语。

phrases.zh: 相组成；相成分；相位成分

example.en: I had to write a composition about the Royal visit.
example.zh: 我得写一篇关于皇室出访的作文。

phrases.zh: 字面意义，字面意思；字义

example.en: In many cases, the people there are fighting, in a literal sense, for their homes.
example.zh: 多数情况下，那里的人们实际上都是在为他们的家园而战斗。

example.en: Brown received an honorary doctorate from Seoul University.
example.zh: 布朗获得了首尔大学的荣誉博士学位。

example.en: Demonstrators were hurling bricks through the windows.
example.zh: 示威者在向窗里掷砖块。

example.en: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states.
example.zh: 宪法还授予巴西25个成员州极大的权力。

example.en: Derrida famously, notoriously, said "there is nothing outside the text," right? What he meant by that, of course, is that there's nothing but text.
example.zh: 德里达著名地，恶名昭彰地，说道，文本之外什么都没有“,是吧，当然，他意思就是说，需要考虑的只有文本。

phrases.zh: 交叉验证，交叉确认；交互效度分析

example.en: In this example, the validation fails.
example.zh: 在这个示例中，验证失败。

example.en: large-scale military offensives which could jeopardize the UN peace process
example.zh: 可能会破坏联合国和平进程的大规模军事进攻

example.en: a sports car, allegedly stolen in Manchester
example.zh: 据说是在曼彻斯特被偷的一辆跑车

example.en: Your dog needs at least 20 minutes of vigorous exercise every day.
example.zh: 你的狗每天需要进行至少20分钟的剧烈运动。

phrases.zh: 人造革；假裘皮；仿造皮毛

example.en: The painting was judged a fake.
example.zh: 这幅画被鉴定为赝品。

example.en: Later he applied to be a contestant on the television show.
example.zh: 之后他报了名做该电视秀的参赛者。

example.en: He writes a weekly column for ‘The Times’.
example.zh: 他每周为《泰晤士报》写一篇专栏文章。

example.en: He soon regretted his hasty decision.
example.zh: 他很快就对自己仓促作出的决定感到后悔了。

phrases.zh: 在…上拖延；细细思考；仔细欣赏；慢吞吞地做某事

example.en: I spent a week at Kandersteg and could happily have lingered on.
example.zh: 我在坎德施泰格逗留了一个星期，本来还可以开开心心地多待几天。

phrases.zh: 继承层次；继承体系；继承阶层架构

example.en: Lucinda has to fight for her life and her inheritance in this gripping novel.
example.zh: 在这部扣人心弦的小说里，露辛达不得不为自己的生命与所继承的遗产进行抗争。

example.en: He seemed very calm and far removed from worldly concerns.
example.zh: 他显得非常淡定，完全没有俗世的忧虑。

example.en: a rectangle with the dimensions 5cm × 2cm
example.zh: 长五厘米、宽两厘米的长方形

example.en: Stephen was regarded as an eligible bachelor.
example.zh: 斯蒂芬被认为是一个钻石王老五。

example.en: He gave up a permanent job in order to freelance.
example.zh: 他放弃了固定工作，为的是当一名自由职业者。

example.en: He studied his map, trying to memorize the way to Rose's street.
example.zh: 他研究了地图，努力记住去罗丝家那条街的路。

example.en: We need to carry out a proper evaluation of the new system.
example.zh: 我们要对新系统进行合理的评估。

phrases.zh: 计算机文化；有使用电脑的能力

example.en: Now he was in the enviable position of not having to work for a living.
example.zh: 现在他已不必为生计而工作，着实令人羡慕。

example.en: a bipartisan committee
example.zh: 一个由两党代表组成的委员会

example.en: The law was amended to include women.
example.zh: 该法律经修改把女性也包括在内。

example.en: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.
example.zh: 他们西班牙语说得很好，答应替我翻译。

example.en: Users can access their voice mail remotely.
example.zh: 用户可以远程获取语音邮件。

phrases.zh: 奥运冠军；奥林匹克冠军

example.en: He passionately championed the poor.
example.zh: 他曾热情地捍卫穷人。

example.en: The river is too dangerous to navigate.
example.zh: 这河道太危险，不适宜航行。

example.en: Their destinies are intertwined.
example.zh: 他们的命运交织在一起。

example.en: Much later he collaborated with his son Michael on the English translation of a text on food production.
example.zh: 后来他和儿子迈克尔合作，把一个有关食品生产的文本翻译成英语。

example.en: You should be able to evaluate your own work.
example.zh: 你应该能够评估自己的工作。

example.en: Looking after the house was viewed as a woman’s domain.
example.zh: 料理家务被认为是女性的份内之事。

example.en: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
example.zh: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

example.en: persistent rumours
example.zh: 持续流传的谣言

example.en: ‘I wouldn’t be afraid,’ she boasted.
example.zh: “我才不怕呢。”她吹嘘道。

example.en: I think we can safely assume (=  it is almost certain  ) that interest rates will go up again soon.
example.zh: 我想我们几乎可以肯定，利率很快会再次上调。

example.en: the forthcoming elections
example.zh: 即将到来的选举

example.en: So what can we do to get more of this marvelous, mysteriously restorative sleep stage?
example.zh: 那么，我们能做些什么才能恢复这个奇妙而神秘的恢复性睡眠阶段？

example.en: She’s an only child, but they didn’t really spoil her.
example.zh: 她是独生女，不过他们也没有娇惯她。

example.en: The green wallpaper is the perfect complement to the old pine of the dresser.
example.zh: 绿色墙纸是旧松木梳妆台的完美衬托。

example.en: cognitive psychology
example.zh: 认知心理学

phrases.zh: 反问；设问；修辞性疑问句

example.en: a speech full of rhetorical phrases
example.zh: 充满华丽辞藻的演讲

example.en: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate.
example.zh: 这种疾病损害了他的思维能力和注意力。

example.en: A competent mechanic should be able to fix the problem.
example.zh: 一名合格的机修工应该能够解决这个问题。

example.en: economic policies that threaten to undermine the health care system
example.zh: 可能会损害医疗保健制度的经济政策

example.en: A standardized programming model should be introduced to avoid technology incompatibility problems.
example.zh: 应该引入标准化编程模型来避免技术不兼容性问题。

example.en: Beneath his refined manners and superficial elegance lay something treacherous.
example.zh: 在他温文尔雅、貌似高贵的举止下隐藏着某种奸诈。

example.en: Smoking during pregnancy endangers your baby’s life.
example.zh: 孕期吸烟会危及胎儿生命。

phrases.zh: 在实践中；实际上，事实上

example.en: religious beliefs and practices
example.zh: 宗教信仰和习俗

example.en: The software decodes the information embedded in the satellite broadcasts.
example.zh: 这种软件能够解读衞星广播中的信息。

example.en: He called for a common European policy on immigration.
example.zh: 他要求欧洲国家实施共同的移民政策。

example.en: She didn’t want to confront the inescapable fact that she would have to sell the house.
example.zh: 她不想面对必须卖掉房子这一无法逃避的事实。

example.en: You look utterly miserable.
example.zh: 你看起来很痛苦。

example.en: an inanimate object
example.zh: 无生命的物体

phrases.zh: 不可逆过程；单向磁化过程

example.en: Fossil fuels have caused irreversible damage to the environment.
example.zh: 矿物燃料已对环境造成了不可挽回的破坏。

translations.text: 不可估量的，无法计算的

example.en: Her contribution to our work is incalculable.
example.zh: 她对我们工作的贡献极大。

example.en: A police car bumped down the track.
example.zh: 一辆警车颠簸着行驶在小路上。

example.en: Supporters staged a demonstration outside the US embassy.
example.zh: 支持者在美国大使馆外举行了示威游行。

phrases.zh: 戈壁沙漠（蒙古和中国西北部）

example.en: Helen was deserted by her husband.
example.zh: 海伦被丈夫遗弃了。

phrases.zh: 在监狱；在狱中服刑；被封锁了

example.en: He’s been in jail for three months already.
example.zh: 他已经入狱三个月。

example.en: Come over to the fire and cozy up a bit.
example.zh: 到火炉这边来会感到舒适一点。

example.en: the television lounge
example.zh: 电视放映室

phrases.zh: ◎自然崇拜，对自然现象的顶礼膜拜
祖先崇拜；祭祖；敬奉祖先

example.en: He absolutely worships her.
example.zh: 他太崇拜她了。

example.en: It was quite rough at times, and she was seasick.
example.zh: 海上有时波涛汹涌，她就晕船。

phrases.zh: 干扰，干涉；妨碍；触动或弄坏；乱动；与……抵触

example.en: Don't interfere in other's private concerns.
example.zh: 不要干涉别人的私事。

example.en: The tension was becoming unbearable, and I wanted to scream.
example.zh: 这种紧张变得难以忍受，我真想大声尖叫。

example.en: Making the transition from youth to adulthood can be very painful.
example.zh: 从青少年过渡到成年有时是一个非常痛苦的过程。

example.en: She accidentally erased the tape.
example.zh: 她意外地抹去了录了音的磁带。

example.en: The afternoon’s exertions had left us feeling exhausted.
example.zh: 下午太劳累了，我们感到精疲力竭。

example.en: She had information that she couldn’t wait to impart.
example.zh: 她得到了消息，迫不及待地想告诉别人。

example.en: The novel has provoked fierce debate in the US.
example.zh: 那部小说在美国引发了激烈的争论。

example.en: You would be making an assumption that's not based on any fact that you could report.
example.zh: 你会做出不以你能报道的任何事实为依据的一种假设。

phrases.zh: 婴儿配方；婴儿配方食品

example.en: the formula for calculating distance
example.zh: 计算距离的公式

example.en: When the bag is folded, the bottom overlaps one side.
example.zh: 把包折叠起来时，其底部与一边就重合了。

example.en: plants that thrive in tropical rain forests
example.zh: 在热带雨林蓬勃生长的植物

phrases.zh: 慢性肾功能衰竭；慢性肾衰竭

example.en: chronic arthritis
example.zh: 慢性关节炎

example.en: his courage in the face of adversity
example.zh: 他面对逆境的勇气

example.en: It seemed impossible that anyone could endure such pain.
example.zh: 似乎谁都不可能忍受这样的疼痛。

phrases.zh: 坚持自己的权利或意见

example.en: French cooking, she asserted, is the best in the world.
example.zh: 她坚称法国菜是世界上最好的。

example.en: This meat’s so tough I can hardly chew it!
example.zh: 这肉太老了，我几乎嚼不动！

example.en: However, these elements of risk can be mitigated by spending more effort developing the queries; as with many development options, there is a tradeoff between query complexity and query stability.
example.zh: 但是，可以多花些精力来开发查询，从而减轻这些风险元素；正如许多开发选择一样，在查询的复杂性与查询的稳定性之间会有一个权衡。

example.en: political commentators
example.zh: 政治评论员

phrases.zh: 副处长；副主任；副院长；副会长

example.en: Smoking is my only vice.
example.zh: 吸烟是我唯一的恶习。

example.en: Women tend to attribute their success to external causes such as luck.
example.zh: 女性往往把她们的成功归因于外因，如运气。

phrases.zh: 生动的描述；生动的报导
逼真模式；栩栩如生的描写

example.en: I’ve got vivid memories of that summer.
example.zh: 我对那年夏天记忆犹新。

example.en: Helicopters have been upgraded and modernized.
example.zh: 直升机已经升级并且装上现代化设备。

phrases.zh: 前瞻研究；预期研究；远景调查

example.en: The story should act as a warning to other prospective buyers.
example.zh: 这篇报道应该可以对其他可能的购买者起到警告作用。

example.en: The authorities moved him to the less rigid regime of an open prison.
example.zh: 当局把他移送到管理相对宽松的不设防监狱。

example.en: The girl’s family have made a public appeal for help to try and catch her killer.
example.zh: 那名遇害女孩的家人吁请公众协助捉拿凶手。

phrases.zh: 斜纹组织；斜纹织；斜织法

example.en: hand-woven scarves
example.zh: 手织围巾

example.en: I learned to sew at school.
example.zh: 我在学校学会了缝纫。

example.en: an afternoon nap
example.zh: 午睡

example.en: Jenny used to row at college (= as a sport ) .
example.zh: 珍妮以前在大学里经常参加划船运动。

example.en: You can helicopter to the island.
example.zh: 你可以乘坐直升机去那个岛。

example.en: The Normans conquered England in 1066.
example.zh: 诺曼人于 1066 年征服英格兰。

phrases.zh: n. 谅解备忘录，理解备忘录；学术合作备忘录

example.en: ...a memorandum from the Department of Defense on its role.
example.zh: …一份来自国防部的有关其角色的备忘录。

example.en: Letters may be edited for length and clarity.
example.zh: 信件可能要加以修改以求篇幅合适，意思明了。

example.en: He is a carpenter by profession.
example.zh: 他以木工为业。

example.en: He was a drummer in a rock band.
example.zh: 他是一支摇滚乐队的鼓手。

example.en: laws to prevent discrimination
example.zh: 防止歧视的法律

example.en: Parents were left anxious, uninformed, and isolated.
example.zh: 家长们忧心忡忡，不知道情况到底如何，感到孤立无援。

example.en: If the warranty is limited, the terms may entitle you to a replacement or refund.
example.zh: 如果保修单有限制，这些条款可让你有权换货或退款。

example.en: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill.
example.zh: 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

example.en: a subordinate officer
example.zh: 下级官员

example.en: The uprising was ruthlessly suppressed.
example.zh: 起义受到了残酷的镇压。

example.en: He is next in line to the throne (= will become king when the present ruler dies ) .
example.zh: 他是第一王位继承人。

example.en: ...students who play intercollegiate athletics.
example.zh: …参加大学校际体育运动的学生们。

example.en: a tennis coach
example.zh: 网球教练

example.en: the biodiversity of the rainforest
example.zh: 热带雨林中的生物多样性

example.en: He bought a huge house to accommodate his library.
example.zh: 他买了一座大房子来放他的藏书。

phrases.zh: 极限承载力，极限承载量；轴承极限能力，承载量

example.en: The ultimate outcome of the experiment cannot be predicted.
example.zh: 试验的最后结果无法预测。

example.en: invasive bladder cancers
example.zh: 扩散性膀胱癌

example.en: The Labour Department figures underscore the shaky state of the economic recovery.
example.zh: 劳工部的数字突出显示了经济复苏的不稳定。

example.en: their ongoing search for a new director
example.zh: 他们仍在寻找一个新主任

example.en: a greedy and selfish society
example.zh: 一个贪婪自私的社会

example.en: Gradually her anxiety lessened.
example.zh: 她的焦虑慢慢减轻了。

example.en: And operational downtime caused by reliability or performance problems can incur opportunity costs if customers are unable to access your system or the business is unable to do its work.
example.zh: 并且如果顾客不能访问你的系统或业务不能进行工作，那么由可靠性或性能问题引起的运作停工就会招致机会成本。

phrases.zh: 积分部分；整数部份；主要的部分

example.en: Rituals, celebrations, and festivals form an integral part of every human society.
example.zh: 仪式、庆典和节日是每个人类社会不可缺少的组成部分。

phrases.zh: 融入（车流中）；与…结合；于…联合

example.en: The company plans to merge its subsidiaries in the US.
example.zh: 该公司计划合并其在美国的几家子公司。

example.en: I brushed up against him unintentionally.
example.zh: 我无意中碰了他一下。

phrases.zh: 乱葬冈；集体埋葬的墓地

example.en: Matthew’s life is in grave danger .
example.zh: 马修的生命危在旦夕。

example.en: an intimate friend of Picasso’s
example.zh: 毕加索的一个密友

example.en: measures to alleviate poverty
example.zh: 扶贫措施

example.en: The notice must be displayed in a conspicuous place.
example.zh: 通告一定要贴在显眼的地方。

phrases.zh: 北领地，北部领地；北部地方

example.en: Hong Kong is a Chinese territory.
example.zh: 香港是中国的领土。

example.en: Coal has been displaced by natural gas as a major source of energy.
example.zh: 作为一种主要能源，煤的地位已为天然气所取代。

example.en: The fields give high and stable yields regardless of climatic circumstances.
example.zh: 不管天气条件如何， 这块地总是保持稳产高产。

example.en: There could be a serious loss of efficiency through unnecessary duplication of resources.
example.zh: 不必要的资源重复会导致严重的效率损耗。

example.en: Leslie jumped to her feet, overturning her chair.
example.zh: 莱斯莉一跃而起，碰倒了椅子。

phrases.zh: n. 同卵双生，全等双生

example.en: four identical houses
example.zh: 四幢一模一样的房子

phrases.zh: 小型高尔夫游戏；小小高尔夫球

example.en: miniature roses
example.zh: 微型玫瑰

example.en: a tempting job offer
example.zh: 一个诱人的工作机会

example.en: The Supreme Court unanimously ruled that racial segregation in schools was unconstitutional.
example.zh: 最高法院一致裁定学校实施的种族隔离措施违反宪法。

example.en: a price variance of 5%
example.zh: 5%的价格差异

example.en: He is bitter about the inaction of the other political parties.
example.zh: 他为其他政党的不作为感到愤愤不平。

example.en: We must conserve our woodlands for future generations.
example.zh: 我们必须为子孙后代保护林地。

example.en: It’s a six-month lease but it’s renewable.
example.zh: 租期六个月，但是可以续签。

example.en: We hope these regions will embrace democratic reforms.
example.zh: 我们希望这些地区会乐意接受民主改革。

example.en: As soon as he heard what was afoot, he telephoned his German and Italian counterparts to protest.
example.zh: 他一听到在进行中的事，马上就给德国和意大利相应人员打电话抗议。

example.en: This gives the company a competitive advantage over its rivals.
example.zh: 这使该公司与其对手相比具有一项竞争优势。

example.en: Young people today are under intense pressure to succeed.
example.zh: 如今的年轻人面临要出人头地的巨大压力。

example.en: aspirational young women
example.zh: 有抱负的年轻女性

example.en: Increased population has transformed the landscape.
example.zh: 人口的增加使景观发生了变化。

phrases.zh: 控制；把握关键；管束；抓拄

example.en: Hold the microphone in a firm grip and keep it still.
example.zh: 紧紧握住麦克风不要让它动。

example.en: As the story unfolds, we learn more about Max’s childhood.
example.zh: 随着故事的展开，我们对马克斯的童年有了更多的了解。

phrases.zh: 思想教育；政治教育；意识形态教育

example.en: The party is split by ideological differences.
example.zh: 意识形态上的差异造成该政党分裂。

example.en: The water in the tank is constantly filtered.
example.zh: 鱼缸里的水在不停地被过滤。

example.en: Now if we could only figure out the pronoun problem.
example.zh: 现在我们可以解决这个代词问题了。

example.en: Emma studies philosophy at university.
example.zh: 埃玛在大学攻读哲学。

example.en: The report illuminated the difficult issues at the heart of science policy.
example.zh: 报告阐明了科学方针核心部分的难点。

phrases.zh: 与…争执，意见不一致；与…不和；差异

example.en: (= it is likely ) that he will commit the same crime again.
example.zh: 他可能还会犯同样的罪行。

example.en: Occasionally people confess to crimes they haven’t committed just to get attention.
example.zh: 偶尔人们会承认自己并未犯过的罪行，那只是为了引人注意。

example.en: He was one of those men who manipulated people.
example.zh: 他是那种要摆布别人的人。

phrases.zh: 生理节律；[化]近昼夜节律；日周期节律

example.en: Drums are basic to African rhythm.
example.zh: 非洲音乐节奏少不了鼓。

example.en: The airliner was hijacked by a group of terrorists.
example.zh: 该航班被一帮恐怖分子劫持。

phrases.zh: 扫地；清洁地面；清扫地板，拖地板

example.en: Bert swept the path in front of the house.
example.zh: 伯特清扫了屋前的小路。

example.en: calls for Britain to withdraw from the European Union
example.zh: 要求英国退出欧盟的呼声

example.en: Flames poured out of the windows of the building.
example.zh: 火焰从大楼窗口冒出来。

phrases.zh: n. 火花塞；带头人；中坚分子

example.en: sparks from the fire
example.zh: 火里飞出的火星

example.en: But this is only at an early stage of feasibility study.
example.zh: 但是这仅仅处于可行性研究的初期阶段。

example.en: Politics fascinated Franklin's father.
example.zh: 政治让富兰克林的父亲着迷。

example.en: The plane crashed, killing two of the crew and four passengers.
example.zh: 飞机坠毁，造成两名机组人员和四名乘客死亡。

example.en: Learning is a cumulative process.
example.zh: 学习是个逐渐积累的过程。

example.en: I hoped he would stop asking awkward questions .
example.zh: 我希望他不要再问令人难堪的问题。

example.en: Now, on the eve of the bicentenary of the independence movements, he sets out to rescue San Martín from his relative obscurity.
example.zh: 今天，在那场独立运动二百周年纪念前夕，他再度出手以挽救相对默默无闻的圣·马丁。

example.en: We were each handed a badge with our name on it.
example.zh: 我们每个人都拿到一个徽章，上面有我们的名字。

phrases.zh: 以优异成绩，以杰出的表现

example.en: There are obvious distinctions between the two wine-making areas.
example.zh: 这两个酿酒区之间有明显的不同。

example.en: By visualizing where you want to be, you start helping your mind formulate ways to achieve that next goal in your life.
example.zh: 通过把你想达到的程度形象化，你就开始帮助自己的头脑制定目标——为了达到你生活中的下一个目标。

example.en: the government’s tight monetary policy
example.zh: 政府从紧的货币政策

example.en: Romantic artists portrayed nature as wild and powerful.
example.zh: 浪漫主义艺术家描绘的大自然是狂野而强大的。

example.en: The last decade has witnessed a serious rise in the levels of racism and hostility to black and ethnic groups.
example.zh: 过去的10年里，种族主义及对黑人和少数民族的敌意变得更加严重了。

phrases.zh: n. 稳健设计；坚稳设计
抗差估计，稳健估计；强估计

example.en: a robust man of six feet four
example.zh: 一个身高六英尺四英寸的壮汉

example.en: Other charges include fraud and illegal appropriation of land.
example.zh: 其他指控包括诈骗和非法占用土地。

example.en: the deforestation of the tropics
example.zh: 热带森林的毁坏

phrases.zh: n. 七巧板；智力拼图玩具

example.en: a question that continues to puzzle scientists
example.zh: 一直困扰科学家的问题

example.en: What does this migration not do?
example.zh: 这种迁移不能做什么？

example.en: Poor soil has constrained the level of crop production.
example.zh: 贫瘠的土地限制了农作物的产量。

example.en: Sometimes he would sneak out of his house late at night to be with me.
example.zh: 有时候他会在深夜偷偷溜出他的家来陪伴我。

example.en: Margins are low and many companies are struggling.
example.zh: 利润很少，很多公司都在苦苦挣扎。

example.en: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife
example.zh: 夫妻之间传统的分工

phrases.zh: 特权；特别优惠；特殊许可

example.en: He had no special privileges and was treated just like every other prisoner.
example.zh: 他不享受特权，待遇和任何其他犯人一样。

example.en: Britain’s imperial expansion in the 19th century
example.zh: 19世纪英帝国的扩张

example.en: Children have a strong sense of justice.
example.zh: 儿童有很强的正义感。

example.en: Norris twice knocked down his opponent in the early rounds of the fight.
example.zh: 诺里斯在拳击赛的头几个回合中，曾两度击倒他的对手。

example.en: His leg was crushed in the accident.
example.zh: 他的腿在事故中被压断。

phrases.zh: 一起合作；在日常工作中

example.en: We can harness the power of the wind to generate electricity.
example.zh: 我们可以利用风力发电。

example.en: The company has monopolized the soft drinks market.
example.zh: 该公司垄断了软饮料市场。

example.en: Suddenly, there was a tremendous bang, and the whole station shook.
example.zh: 突然一声巨响，整个车站都晃动了。

example.en: The work she does is absolutely vital.
example.zh: 她所做的工作至关重要。

phrases.zh: 祈使语气；命令语气；祈使式

example.en: It is imperative that politicians should be good communicators.
example.zh: 政治家应该是很好的沟通者，这很重要。

phrases.zh: 初始值；原始价值；基础资料

example.en: an initial investment of £5,000
example.zh: 5,000英镑的初始投资

example.en: Try not to distract the other students.
example.zh: 尽量不要让其他学生分心。

example.en: convincing evidence of his guilt
example.zh: 证明他有罪的有力证据

example.en: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay.
example.zh: 如果症状持续的话，马上咨询医生。

phrases.zh: (感情上的)突然而强烈的爆发，任何精神上的激动
（英）问答专栏阿姨；心理咨询阿姨

example.en: the agony of arthritis
example.zh: 关节炎的剧烈疼痛

example.en: Although I advise that you refrain from decoding XML documents with ad hoc routines, I have no qualms about writing.
example.zh: 虽然我建议您避免使用特殊的例程解码 XML 文档，但是对于写入 XML 没有这样的疑虑。

example.en: a thrilling 3-2 victory
example.zh: 比分为3比2的激动人心的胜利

example.en: That causes your test to terminate prematurely, too, of course.
example.zh: 当然，那也将导致你的测试过早地终止。

example.en: A conscientious teacher may feel inclined to take work home.
example.zh: 一个认真负责的教师可能会想着把工作带回家去做。

example.en: A new computer system entails a lot of re-training.
example.zh: 使用新的计算机系统需要大量的再培训。

example.en: Someone stole my credit card and forged my signature.
example.zh: 有人偷了我的信用卡，并假冒我的签名。

example.en: To say that all motorists speed in residential areas is overstating the case.
example.zh: 说所有驾驶员都在住宅区内超速行驶是言过其实了。

example.en: The hospital should be held accountable for the quality of care it gives.
example.zh: 医院应当对医护质量负责。

example.en: a pessimistic view of life
example.zh: 对人生的悲观看法

example.en: The book was subsequently translated into 15 languages.
example.zh: 该书后来被译成 15 种语言。

phrases.zh: 侵入，潜入（他人电脑）；私自存取或篡改（他人电脑资料）
有限责任；有限债务责任

example.en: The company had assets of $138 million and liabilities of $120.5 million.
example.zh: 该公司有1.38亿美元资产和1.205亿美元的负债。

example.en: ...the conversion of disused rail lines into cycle routes.
example.zh: …把废弃的铁路改变成自行车道。

phrases.zh: 如坐针毡；焦躁不安；手脚发麻
[美国俚语]注射毒品的，有毒瘾的

example.en: She carried hypodermic needles and syringes in her bag.
example.zh: 她包里带着皮下注射针和针筒。

example.en: A reading over 50 indicates an expansion of activity in the manufacturing sector, while one below 50 suggests a deterioration.
example.zh: 这一指数高于50表明制造业处于扩张状态，低于50时则反映制造业状况在恶化。

example.en: I’m really sorry - it’s all my fault.
example.zh: 我真的很抱歉——都是我的错。

phrases.zh: 火炬传递；火炬接力；圣火传递

example.en: The broadcasts were relayed by satellite.
example.zh: 这些电视节目通过卫星进行转播。

example.en: But it contained one very interesting piece of data: in 2008, for the first time in sixteen years, the finance and insurance industry shrank.
example.zh: 但是，这份报告里有一项非常耐人寻味的数据：在2008年，金融保险业出现近十六年来的首次萎缩。

example.en: The US Open will be transmitted live via satellite.
example.zh: 美国公开赛将通过卫星现场直播。

example.en: "I didn't ask you to come. Incidentally, why have you come?"
example.zh: “我没有叫你来。顺便问一下，你为什么来呢？”

example.en: Emigration has notably increased over the past five years.
example.zh: 在过去五年中，移居国外的人明显增加。

example.en: His books have sold more than 20 million copies worldwide.
example.zh: 他的书在全世界卖出了两千多万本。

example.en: We are not so much testing as proposal-thinning, and we can add rigor such as traceability and other documentation as the leading architectural candidates emerge.
example.zh: 我们不像细化提议那样做太多测试，随着最主要的架构候选的出现，我们可以添加严密，如可溯性和其他文档。

example.en: It takes time to readjust after a divorce.
example.zh: 离婚后需要时间重新适应。

example.en: I was trying to think of some way to prolong the conversation.
example.zh: 我在想方设法拖长这次谈话。

example.en: Feminists have redefined the role of women.
example.zh: 女权主义者们已重新定义了女性角色。

example.en: the controversial issue of welfare reform
example.zh: 福利改革这一有争议的话题

example.en: Instead, if you do not use your mental faculties, you accelerate the degeneration of cells and the loss of your cognitive abilities.
example.zh: 相反，要是你不经常使用你的精神能力，你就会加速这些细胞的退化甚至会导致你的认知能力的丧失。

phrases.zh: 蓄意损害所造成的损失

example.en: a malicious girl
example.zh: 恶毒的女孩

example.en: They’re widening the road.
example.zh: 他们正在拓宽马路。

phrases.zh: 电流密度；扩散（弥漫）流密度

example.en: areas of high population density
example.zh: 人口密度高的地区

phrases.zh: 大城市区域，大都市区；大都会区

example.en: a metropolitan area of South Australia
example.zh: 南澳大利亚的一个都市区

example.en: a prominent Russian scientist
example.zh: 杰出的俄罗斯科学家

example.en: However, no study on the prevalence of infertility has been conducted in this area.
example.zh: 但是，在这个地区不曾进行过任何关于不孕症流行情况的研究。

example.en: The bushes grew in a compact mass.
example.zh: 灌木长成茂密的一片。

example.en: ...the correlation between smoking and disease.
example.zh: …吸烟和疾病之间的关联。

example.en: a machine that simulates conditions in space
example.zh: 一台模拟太空环境的机器

example.en: incentives to maintain the momentum of European integration
example.zh: 保持欧洲一体化发展势头的激励措施

example.en: light fixtures
example.zh: 照明设备

phrases.zh: 价值主张；价值定位；价值命题
◎[口语]向某人提出一项办法(或提议)

example.en: He telephoned Stuart with a proposition.
example.zh: 他打电话给斯图尔特提了个建议。

example.en: And our goal is to find out the time, the dynamics of this problem.
example.zh: 我们的目的是找出时间，找出这个问题的动力学。

example.en: The authors show how this was triggered by his belief in the common descent of all humans.
example.zh: 作者表明，这张图是如何由他的信仰引发出来的，达尔文相信全人类属于共同的血统。

phrases.zh: 政治背景；政治立场；政治面貌
美感，审美观念；审美知觉

example.en: He is interested in how our perceptions of death affect the way we live.
example.zh: 他对我们的死亡观如何影响我们的生活方式感兴趣。

example.en: The smell of diesel oil permeated the air.
example.zh: 空气里充斥着柴油的气味。

example.en: If that doesn't work, do a Web search on the term "recruiter" or "HR director" along with the name of your employer of choice.
example.zh: 如果这招无效的话，那就在网站上输入你可选择的雇主名单加上“招聘人员”或“人力资源部经理”一起搜索。

example.en: diluted fruit juice
example.zh: 稀释的果汁

example.en: You need to prioritize your tasks.
example.zh: 你需要按照轻重缓急安排自己的工作。

example.en: Kylie feels fortunate to be in such a privileged position because of her successful TV career.
example.zh: 凯莉觉得由于成功的电视生涯而使自己处于这样优越的地位真是幸运。

example.en: Each child had participated in extracurricular activities at school.
example.zh: 每个孩子都参加了学校的课外活动。

example.en: Sleep deprivation can result in mental disorders.
example.zh: 缺乏睡眠会引起精神紊乱。

phrases.zh: 迎合；供应伙食；为…提供所需

example.en: We cater to an exclusive clientele.
example.zh: 我们满足一个特殊客户群的需求。

phrases.zh: 皮尔斯·布鲁斯南（美国电影演员）

example.en: Steam the corn until it can easily be pierced with a fork.
example.zh: 把玉米蒸到用叉子可以轻易扎透。

example.en: He had surpassed all our expectations .
example.zh: 他超越了我们所有的预期。

phrases.zh: 到达目标上空；正追踪目标；切题，切中要害
目的语；目标语言；译入语

example.en: There is no target date for completion of the new project.
example.zh: 这个新的项目何时完工没有预定日期。

example.en: She was ready and willing to work hard.
example.zh: 她工作积极肯干。

example.en: Newman played a central role in framing the new law.
example.zh: 纽曼在拟定新法的过程中发挥了主要作用。

example.en: He looked mournful, even near to tears.
example.zh: 他看上去很悲伤，几乎要掉泪了。

example.en: We cultivated maize and watermelons.
example.zh: 我们种植玉米和西瓜。

example.en: Research is the cornerstone of the profession.
example.zh: 研究是该职业的基石。

example.en: Divorce was legalized in 1981.
example.zh: 离婚在1981年被合法化了。

phrases.zh: 刚构桥，刚架桥；刚架式桥梁

example.en: rigid and authoritarian methods of education
example.zh: 死板、专断的教育方法

example.en: The accounts were certified by an auditor.
example.zh: 这些账目经审计员核实过。

phrases.zh: 在轨道上；在轨道上运行；[俚语]飘飘然

example.en: Mars and Earth have orbits which change with time.
example.zh: 火星和地球的轨道随着时间而发生改变。

phrases.zh: n. 天文望远镜（等于Kepler telescope）

example.en: Houses in the subdivision are going for astronomical prices.
example.zh: 该小区里的房子在以天价出售。

phrases.zh: 现有的；现存的；实际存在的；实有的

example.en: Scientists have many theories about how the universe first came into existence (= started to exist ).
example.zh: 关于宇宙的起源，科学家有多种理论。

example.en: ...intolerant attitudes toward non-Catholics.
example.zh: …对非天主教徒的不宽容态度。

example.en: Please state your name, address and occupation.
example.zh: 请写明你的姓名、地址和职业。

example.en: His family then moved to a slightly larger house.
example.zh: 他的家后来搬到了一间稍微大一点儿的房子。

example.en: the urgent need to exploit the resources of the Irish Sea
example.zh: 开发爱尔兰海资源的迫切需要

example.en: Regarding your recent inquiry, I have enclosed a copy of our new brochure.
example.zh: 关于你最近的咨询，我随信附上一本我们最新的手册。

example.en: ...the forest ecosystem.
example.zh: …森林生态系统。

example.en: a noted author
example.zh: 著名作家

example.en: It allows you to harness existing technologies and incorporate them into one application.
example.zh: 它允许您利用现有的技术并将它们合并到同一个应用程序中。

translations.text: 互相作用的，互相影响的

example.en: interactive computer systems
example.zh: 交互式电脑系统

example.en: Protesters found a novel way of demonstrating against steeply rising oil prices.
example.zh: 抗议者们找到一种新奇的示威方式来反对石油价格的飙升。

example.en: His gross mismanagement left the company desperately in need of restructuring.
example.zh: 他处理事务的严重不当使得公司急需重组。

example.en: an irrational fear of flying
example.zh: 对飞行非理性的恐惧

example.en: Fortunately my suspicions proved groundless .
example.zh: 幸好我的猜疑后来证明是没有根据的。

example.en: proposals to radically restructure Britain’s electronics industry
example.zh: 彻底整顿英国电子行业的提议

example.en: Tax cuts provided the stimulus which the slow economy needed.
example.zh: 减税为不景气的经济带来了其所需的刺激。

phrases.zh: [化]可行域；[计]可行区域；[经]可行性区域
经济上可行的，经济上合算

example.en: a feasible solution
example.zh: 可行的解决方法

example.en: Branagh won two awards for his screen adaptation of Shakespeare's Henry the Fifth.
example.zh: 布拉纳因他对莎士比亚的《亨利五世》的荧幕改编而获了两次奖。

example.en: research institutes
example.zh: 研究所

phrases.zh: 植物生化学；植物生物化学

example.en: ...the effects of air pollutants on the biochemistry of plants or animals.
example.zh: …大气污染物对植物或动物生化过程的影响。

example.en: “You have to be an optimist to be an inventor or entrepreneur, ” he concludes.
example.zh: 要成为一位发明家或企业家，你必须得是个乐天派。

example.en: A crisis has arisen in the Foreign Office.
example.zh: 外交部出现了危机。

example.en: The plane ascended rapidly.
example.zh: 飞机迅速爬升。

example.en: a combination nightclub and café
example.zh: 夜总会兼咖啡馆

example.en: It’s impossible for me to give you a definite answer.
example.zh: 我不可能给你明确的答复。

example.en: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands.
example.zh: 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

phrases.zh: n. 程序设计；程式设计

example.en: He only pursues writing-only careers like novelist, journalist or copyrighter, when instead, he could have looked into being a minister, public relations assistant, editor or government lobbyist.
example.zh: 他只追求纯写作的职业，比如小说家、记者或剧作家，而实际上，他也可以找代理人、公共关系助手、编辑或政府说客之类的工作。

translations.text: 过剩的；失业的，被解雇的

example.en: Seventy factory workers were made redundant in the resulting cuts.
example.zh: 在继而发生的裁员中，70名工厂工人被解雇。

example.en: This alternative would have to operate as any other insurer, on the basis of the premiums it collects.
example.zh: 这个选项如同其他的保险公司一样，依靠它收取的保费生存。

example.en: He tends to overestimate his own abilities.
example.zh: 他往往高估自己的能力。

example.en: In addition to property damage, the floods have affected some of the nation's most fertile cropland, and are expected to have an impact on already rising food prices, especially for crops like corn.
example.zh: 除了财产损失之外，洪水还影响了美国一部分最肥沃的耕地，并预计对已经不断增加的粮食价格有所影响，尤其是像玉米这样的农作物。

example.en: Rivers and lakes provide us with water transport and irrigation.
example.zh: 江河湖泽给我们以舟楫和灌溉之利。

example.en: Drinking water supplies are believed to have been contaminated.
example.zh: 据信饮用水已受到污染。

example.en: untreated sewage
example.zh: 未经处理过的污水

example.en: Overcrowding and poor sanitation are common problems in prisons.
example.zh: 过度拥挤和卫生状况差是监狱里的普遍问题。

example.en: The sound of an engine echoed back from the thick forest.
example.zh: 从茂密的森林里传来引擎的回声。

example.en: She kept both the duplicate and the original.
example.zh: 她把复制本和原本都保留着。

example.en: Language has elevated humans above the other animals.
example.zh: 语言使人类高于其他动物。

example.en: Let me give an example to illustrate the point.
example.zh: 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

example.en: ‘Why are you doing that?’ the boy inquired.
example.zh: “你为什么这么做？”男孩问道。

example.en: A similar situation prevails in Canada.
example.zh: 同样的情况在加拿大也普遍存在。

example.en: soldiers with grenades strapped to their belts
example.zh: 腰带上绑着手榴弹的士兵

example.en: the turbulent times of the French Revolution
example.zh: 法国大革命的动荡时期

example.en: an armed rebellion
example.zh: 武装叛乱

example.en: He stayed at the Four Seasons Hotel, from whose lofty heights he could see across New York.
example.zh: 他住在四季酒店，从酒店高处可以看到纽约的全景。

example.en: an obligation to render assistance to those in need
example.zh: 为有困难的人提供援助的义务

example.en: recyclable cardboard packaging
example.zh: 可回收利用的纸板包装材料

phrases.zh: 不招待就使坏（指万圣节孩子们挨家逐户要糖果等礼物，如不遂愿便恶作剧一番的风俗）
帽子戏法（指连入三球），[板球]连中三柱（使对方三击球手退场）

example.en: Pretending he doesn’t remember is an old trick of his.
example.zh: 假装不记得是他的老花招了。

example.en: We successfully completed the certification for open water diving.
example.zh: 我们成功地拿到了开放水域潜水证书。

example.en: The prevailing mood of public opinion remained hostile.
example.zh: 公众仍普遍持敌对情绪。

example.en: He noted that a Scientologist hearing this would feel, with some justification, that he had misled his auditors about his progress.
example.zh: 他指出，山达基信徒听到这些之后，会有一些理由，感觉他在关于进展方面误导了听析师。

phrases.zh: 高斯消去法，高斯消元法

example.en: If you need to remove an agent you will have to do it by a process of elimination.
example.zh: 如果您需要删除代理，将必须通过消除进程的方式进行此工作。

example.en: unqualified staff
example.zh: 不合格的员工

example.en: a subconscious fear of failure
example.zh: 对失败下意识的恐惧

example.en: an incompetent manager
example.zh: 不称职的经理

example.en: He is incapable of discriminating between a good idea and a terrible one.
example.zh: 他没能力在一个好主意和一个坏主意之间进行区分。

example.en: a tall, elegant young woman
example.zh: 身材高挑、举止优雅的年轻女子

example.en: The new ball gown was a great success.
example.zh: 那件新款长礼服非常成功。

example.en: Guests toasted the bride and groom with champagne.
example.zh: 客人们以香槟为新娘新郎敬酒。

example.en: the film’s lavish costumes and spectacular sets
example.zh: 影片中奢华的戏装和壮观的场景

example.en: They had to travel into town to trade the produce from their farm.
example.zh: 他们不得不到镇上去出售他们农场的产品。

example.en: Many users end up dealing to support their habit.
example.zh: 许多吸毒者最后都是靠做毒品买卖来供自己吸毒。

phrases.zh: 走路；滚开；哪凉快那歇着去

example.en: He wants to hike round the world.
example.zh: 他打算徒步旅行环游世界一周。

example.en: The government must take action (=do something) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
example.zh: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

example.en: She is still trying to get over the attack and the resultant injuries.
example.zh: 她仍在努力从袭击以及由此造成的伤害中恢复过来。

example.en: the rise in inflation and consequent fall in demand
example.zh: 通货膨胀的加剧和随之而来的需求下降

example.en: ...music by Strauss, Mozart, Beethoven, and other great composers.
example.zh: …施特劳斯、莫扎特、贝多芬及其他伟大作曲家创作的音乐。

example.en: When you're busy all day the last thing you want to do is spend hours slaving over a hot stove.
example.zh: 当你忙碌了一整天后，你最不愿意做的事就是花好几个钟头在灼热的火炉边辛苦地劳作。

example.en: Grunting with effort, she lifted me up.
example.zh: 她哼哧着费力地把我抱起来。

example.en: I can't abide people with no sense of humour.
example.zh: 我讨厌和没有幽默感的人打交道。

example.en: Shelley valued her privacy.
example.zh: 谢利很重视自己的隐私。

example.en: We do this because we believe in the dignity and value of every person.
example.zh: 我们这样做是因为我们相信每个人的尊严和价值。

example.en: the outermost stars
example.zh: 最远的恒星

example.en: optimum conditions for growth
example.zh: 最适宜生长的条件

example.en: Stan initially wanted to go to medical school.
example.zh: 斯坦最初想进医学院。

example.en: Normally she wore little makeup, but this evening was clearly an exception.
example.zh: 通常她很少化妆，可今晚显然是个例外。

example.en: a major block to progress
example.zh: 进步的重大阻碍

example.en: ...a sensational book in which she damns the ultraright party.
example.zh: …她谴责极右党派的一本耸人听闻的书。

example.en: There'll be ample opportunity to relax, swim and soak up some sun.
example.zh: 将会有充足的机会来放松、游泳和接受一些阳光。

example.en: A light lunch will suffice.
example.zh: 简单的午餐就够了。

example.en: The landlord refused to renew his lease.
example.zh: 房东拒绝和他续签租约。

phrases.zh: 佣船契约；包船契约；租船方

example.en: We chartered a boat to take us to some of the smaller islands.
example.zh: 我们包了一条船带我们到一些较小的岛上去。

example.en: the headquarters of the United Nations
example.zh: 联合国总部

phrases.zh: 主体，主要部分；主船体；机身

example.en: The report found that many of Yorkshire’s water mains needed replacing.
example.zh: 报告中说约克郡的很多自来水总管道需要更换。

example.en: ...the overall rise in unemployment.
example.zh: …失业人数的总体上升。

example.en: The conceit of the woman!
example.zh: 这个自负的女人！

example.en: The sun's ultraviolet rays are responsible for both tanning and burning.
example.zh: 太阳的紫外线是皮肤晒黑和晒伤的原因。

example.en: The ambassador has endowed a $1 million public-service fellowships programme.
example.zh: 大使资助了一个100万美元的公共服务奖学金项目。

translations.text: 中产阶级的；庸俗的；资产阶级的

example.en: She came from a bourgeois family.
example.zh: 她来自一个中产阶级家庭。

example.en: A woodcutter and a woodpecker lived in the forest.
example.zh: 森林里居住着一个樵夫和一个啄木鸟。

phrases.zh: 股市崩盘；股市行情暴跌

example.en: The door swung inwards to crash against a chest of drawers behind it.
example.zh: 门摆向里面，砰的一声猛力撞上了门后的五斗橱。

example.en: My family was in a bad way financially.
example.zh: 我家当时经济窘迫。

example.en: The food was superb.
example.zh: 食物好吃极了。

example.en: a shelf covered with books and ornaments
example.zh: 摆满书籍和装饰品的架子

phrases.zh: 装饰艺术；装饰性艺术饰品

example.en: a decorative panel above the door
example.zh: 门楣上的饰板

example.en: ...an ornamental fountain.
example.zh: …一个装饰性喷泉。

example.en: The goods are ready for shipment.
example.zh: 货物已经准备好装运。

example.en: ...fruits and vegetables that will be canned, skinned, diced, or otherwise processed.
example.zh: …将要经过装罐、去皮、切块或其他加工程序的水果和蔬菜。

example.en: make-up arrayed on the bathroom counter
example.zh: 盥洗台上摆放整齐的化妆品

phrases.zh: 液力变矩器；转矩变换器

example.en: In rotation, force becomes torque, mass becomes moment of inertia, and acceleration becomes angular acceleration.
example.zh: 在旋转时，力变成力矩，质量变成转动惯量，加速度变成角加速度。

phrases.zh: 在盒子里；在方框中；（美俚，禁忌语）（男人）正与女人性交

example.en: the jury box
example.zh: 陪审团席

example.en: Trumpeter Marcus Belgrave ran a jazz workshop for young artists.
example.zh: 鼓手马库斯马贝尔格瑞夫为年轻艺术家们举办了一场爵士乐研讨会。

example.en: a patent lock
example.zh: 专利锁

example.en: She was clutching a bottle of champagne.
example.zh: 她手里紧紧抓着一瓶香槟酒。

phrases.zh: 空巢；空巢期；儿女长大离家

example.en: They say eagles used to nest in those rocks.
example.zh: 他们说以前常有老鹰在那些岩石中筑巢。

example.en: The entrances are guarded by watchful security staff.
example.zh: 入口处由警惕的保安人员把守。

example.en: His son was injected with strong drugs.
example.zh: 他的儿子被注射了强效的药。

phrases.zh: 存储系统；存储器存储系统

example.en: the storage of highly radioactive material
example.zh: 高放射性材料的存放

example.en: The money is principally invested in stocks and shares.
example.zh: 这笔钱主要投资于股票。

example.en: celery stalks
example.zh: 芹菜茎

example.en: I shall be pleased to preside at your meetings.
example.zh: 我很高兴主持你们的会议。

example.en: The demonstrators were ejected from the hall.

example.zh: 该国目前正面临一场经济危机。

example.zh: 历尽艰险的旅程

example.zh: 她来回摇动着婴儿。

example.zh: 年开普勒公布他的发现，认为行星轨道为椭圆形。

example.zh: 拖动火车的蒸汽机车

example.zh: 她站在那里，双手叉腰瞪着他。

example.zh: 男孩子们狼吞虎咽地把薄煎饼吃了。

example.zh: 她去年提前退休了。

example.zh: 这是座很不错的城市，唯一的不足就是天气。

example.zh: 男孩们闯进一家商店，盗走了45英镑现金。

example.zh: 一个蹦蹦跳跳的小女孩

example.zh: 我们的房间可以俯视大海。

example.zh: 人出汗以调节体温。

example.zh: 他仔细地调节了自己的声音。

最终沉降；[法]最后的授与财产清算；最终结算

example.zh: 寻找和平解决北爱尔兰冲突的办法

example.zh: 这些结果和先前的研究一致。

example.zh: 教师们将被要求填写一份调查问卷。

example.zh: 她吃了些自制冰淇淋当餐后甜点。

phrases.zh: 天主教；天主教会；天主教堂；大公教会
罗马天主教的；天主教会的；天主教徒
罗马天主教会；罗马公教

example.en: ...the Catholic Church.
example.zh: …天主教会。

example.zh: 本书的主题是爱与责任之间的冲突。

example.zh: 音乐会由艺术协会出资举办。

example.zh: 这种护肤霜含有滋养肌肤的维生素A。

example.zh: 他再也没有提起这个话题。

example.zh: 几位参议员提交了针对性骚扰的立法议案。

example.zh: 没有一部成文宪法是英国政治制度的一大特点。

example.zh: 风格非常独特的网球选手

example.zh: 他这人原来无聊透顶。

example.zh: ...五颜六色的意大利瓷器和陶器。

example.zh: 杰西曾是个逃犯、土匪、罪犯。

example.zh: 他蹚进水里把船推出来。

example.zh: 一根光纤探针

example.zh: 在炭火上做饭

简明英语；通俗易懂的话

example.zh: 让我们听听坦率而真实的回答吧。

example.zh: 他的首要目标就是把交战各方拉回到谈判桌上。

phrases.zh: 凯特·摩斯（英国超级模特）

example.en: ...ground covered over with moss.
example.zh: …长满青苔的地面。

phrases.zh: （汽车等的）油门踏板；[机]加速踏板

example.en: I couldn't reach the pedals on her bike.
example.zh: 我骑她的车够不到脚蹬子。

example.en: a trivial detail

example.zh: 她把旅行的所有细节都告诉了我。

对…表示担心/忧虑；使（自己）关心…

example.zh: 人们担心的问题之一是治疗的副作用。

example.zh: 给我看看你买的东西。

example.en: She saw the hurt in his eyes.
example.zh: 她看到了他眼中的伤痛。

example.en: Wearing badly-fitting shoes can deform your feet.
example.zh: 穿不合脚的鞋会使脚变形。

example.en: a deformation of the spine
example.zh: 脊柱的畸变

phrases.zh: 电视接收边缘区；边缘地区；干扰区域

example.zh: 这件夹克有皮穗。

example.zh: 用旧零碎材料拼做的一块小地毯

phrases.zh: 随机变数，随机变量；无规变量

example.zh: 这帮犯罪分子随意选择对象下手。

example.zh: 加一瓣压碎的大蒜。

example.zh: 会速记的秘书

example.zh: 他们四处查看，想找个过夜的地方。

example.zh: 她洗了衣服，然后挂出去晾干。

example.zh: 个人道德标准的下降

example.zh: 该地区发生了几宗偷窃案。

example.en: The doctor will have a record of her attendances.
example.zh: 医生会记录她的出诊次数。

phrases.zh: 只限于咱俩之间；我们之间的秘密
只限于咱们之间；秘密的

example.en: The house was near a park but there was a road in between.
example.zh: 房子在一处公园附近，但两者之间隔着一条马路。

phrases.zh: 卵黄囊瘤；卵巢内胚层窦瘤

example.en: Only the yolk contains cholesterol.
example.zh: 只有蛋黄含胆固醇。

phrases.zh: n. 墨匣；墨水盒；油墨盒

example.en: Only four of the five spent cartridges were recovered by police.
example.zh: 5个子弹壳中只有4个被警方收回。

example.en: Two suspects have been detained by the police for questioning .
example.zh: 两名嫌疑人被警方拘留审问。

example.en: Completing the race is not just a simple matter of physical fitness.
example.zh: 跑完比赛不仅仅是纯粹的体力问题。

example.en: Mona wrote with a beautiful simplicity of style.
example.zh: 莫娜的文笔朴实优美。

example.en: Women fill 35% of senior management positions.
example.zh: 女性担任35%的高级管理职位。

example.en: a five-gallon jug of beer
example.zh: 五加仑装的啤酒罐

example.en: He was not good at algebra in middle school.
example.zh: 他中学时不擅长代数。

example.en: ...a prosecuting attorney.
example.zh: …一位公诉律师。

example.en: the Deputy Secretary of State
example.zh: 助理国务卿

example.en: Around 350 delegates attended the conference.
example.zh: 大约有350名代表参加了大会。

phrases.zh: 地震震级，地震等级；地震规模

example.en: an increase of this order of magnitude
example.zh: 如此大幅度的增长

example.en: the only survivor of the massacre
example.zh: 这场大屠杀的唯一幸存者

example.en: He strode toward her.
example.zh: 他大步向她走去。

example.en: the American Embassy in Paris
example.zh: 美国驻巴黎大使馆

example.en: the US ambassador to Spain
example.zh: 美国驻西班牙大使

phrases.zh: 大厦之屋，民信大厦；府邸

example.en: a beautiful country mansion
example.zh: 漂亮的乡村宅第

example.en: I had never seen such a multitude of stars before.
example.zh: 我以前从未见过这么多的星星。

example.en: ...fields of ripening wheat and barley.
example.zh: …快要成熟的小麦和大麦田。

example.en: the warming-up of continental interiors
example.zh: 内陆地区的变暖

example.en: In the equation below, as E goes to zero, n approaches infinity.
example.zh: 在下面的方程式中，E趋向于零时，n接近无穷大。

example.en: ...a steak sizzling on the grill.
example.zh: …一块儿在烤架上滋滋作响的牛排。

example.en: a rainwater butt
example.zh: 接雨水的大桶

example.en: The state of Nevada is largely desert.
example.zh: 内华达州大部分是沙漠。

example.en: The quality of the applicants varies widely.
example.zh: 申请人的素质差异很大。

example.en: Andrew traversed the prairie on horseback.
example.zh: 安德鲁骑马穿越大草原。

phrases.zh: n. 非常流行的东西；轰动的演出

example.en: Vandals had smashed all the windows.
example.zh: 破坏分子打碎了所有的窗子。

example.en: She started coughing and sneezing.
example.zh: 她开始咳嗽、打喷嚏。

example.en: a cigarette lighter
example.zh: 香烟打火机

example.en: He could hear the old man snoring.
example.zh: 他听到老人在打鼾。

example.en: The grain was still sown, cut and threshed as it was a hundred years ago.
example.zh: 谷物的播种、收割、脱粒方法还和一百年前一样。

phrases.zh: 护照检查处；入境检验；验护照

example.en: The only passport to success is hard work.
example.zh: 获得成功的唯一途径就是艰苦奋斗。

example.en: In winter, the villages are inaccessible by road.
example.zh: 冬天时，进入这些村子的路很难走。

phrases.zh: [医]潜伏期；等待周期；反应时间差（介于受刺激与作出反应之间的时间）

example.en: The virus remains latent in the body for many years.
example.zh: 这种病毒会在体内潜伏许多年。

example.en: Human nature is frail.
example.zh: 人性脆弱。

phrases.zh: [精神病学]脆性X综合征；X染色体易损综合征

example.en: The economy remains extremely fragile.
example.zh: 经济仍然极其脆弱。

example.en: a crisp green salad
example.zh: 脆爽的蔬菜色拉

example.en: They hope his election will act as a catalyst for reform.
example.zh: 他们希望他的当选会成为改革的催化剂。

example.en: vulgar behaviour
example.zh: 粗俗的行为

example.en: The bell is massive, weighing over 40 tons.
example.zh: 那口钟非常大，有40多吨重。

phrases.zh: 水泥丛林；立体丛林；混凝土建成的野兽世界

example.en: the Amazon jungle
example.zh: 亚马孙丛林

phrases.zh: 跟踪；坚持完成；继续做某事

example.en: The drains flooded and water overflowed down the main street.
example.zh: 下水道被淹，水溢到了大街上。

phrases.zh: 小灵通（中国网通和中国电信联合推出的移动通信产品）

example.en: My eyes were smarting with the smoke.
example.zh: 我的眼睛被烟熏得发痛。

example.en: Prick the sausages before you grill them.
example.zh: 烤之前把香肠戳孔。

example.en: 10,000 men had volunteered by the end of September; thereafter, approximately 1,000 men enlisted each month.
example.zh: 到9月底时已有10,000人志愿参军，此后，每个月差不多有1,000人应征入伍。

example.en: ...his research in electricity and magnetism.
example.zh: …他在电、磁领域的研究。

example.en: a porcelain vase
example.zh: 瓷花瓶

example.en: A glossary of terms is included for the reader's convenience.
example.zh: 为了方便读者，还收录了术语汇编。

example.en: ‘Writ ’ is the stem of the forms ‘writes ’, ‘writing ’ and ‘written ’.
example.zh: writ是writes、writing和written三个词的词干。

example.en: Andy poked the fish with his finger to see if it was still alive.
example.zh: 安迪用手指戳了戳那条鱼，看它是否还活着。

example.en: She was wearing red lipstick.
example.zh: 她涂着红色唇膏。

phrases.zh: 不锈钢制品（stainless steel product的复数）

example.en: stainless steel
example.zh: 不锈钢

example.en: a perpendicular line
example.zh: 垂直线

example.en: the author of the state reforms
example.zh: 州政府改革的发起者

phrases.zh: 蒸汽吞吐；咆哮；恼怒；恫吓
吹灭；（使）膨胀；气喘吁吁地说

example.en: George puffed and panted and he tried to keep up.
example.zh: 乔治喘着粗气想跟上。

example.en: survivors of the shipwreck
example.zh: 此次海难的幸存者

example.en: Government officials have denied reports of rebel advances.
example.zh: 政府官员否认了有关叛军正在推进的传言。

phrases.zh: 罗曼斯语（由拉丁语演变而成的语言）

example.en: a Medieval romance
example.zh: 中世纪的传奇故事

phrases.zh: 传教士式体位（指男上女下的性交姿势）

example.en: My mother would still like me to be a missionary in Africa.
example.zh: 我母亲还是想让我在非洲做一名传教士。

phrases.zh: 压力传感器；位置传感器

example.en: The latest Japanese vacuum cleaners contain sensors that detect the amount of dust and type of floor.
example.zh: 日本最新款吸尘器装有传感器，能测出灰尘量和地板类型。

example.en: The proposal has been widely publicized in press information circulars sent to 1,800 newspapers.
example.zh: 通过向1800份报纸发送新闻通告，这项提议得到了广泛地宣传。

example.en: a leaflet on skin cancer
example.zh: 有关皮肤癌的宣传页

example.en: All this information can be conveyed in a simple diagram.
example.zh: 所有这些信息可以通过一张简单的图表来表示。

phrases.zh: 焊透率；穿进速率；进尺速度

example.en: The floor is sealed to prevent water penetration.
example.zh: 地板加了密封涂料防止渗水。

example.en: The minister was praised for his acute political antennae (= ability to understand complicated political situations) .
example.zh: 这位部长以政治触觉敏锐而为人称道。

example.en: I was a virgin until I was thirty years old.
example.zh: 我到30岁时还是个处女。

example.en: The bank charges a fixed rate for each transaction.
example.zh: 银行对每一笔业务收取固定费用。

example.en: Our prices are exclusive of sales tax.
example.zh: 我们的价格不包括销售税。

example.en: a notorious computer hacker
example.zh: 声名狼藉的电脑黑客

example.en: a blood specimen
example.zh: 血样

phrases.zh: 萃取法；抽出法；抽取法；抓取模式

example.en: the extraction of salt from seawater
example.zh: 从海水中提取盐

example.en: It's obvious that she adores him.
example.zh: 她显然深深地爱着他。

example.en: We noticed tiny bugs that were all over the walls.
example.zh: 我们发现墙上爬满了小虫。

example.en: The guard punched my ticket and I got on.
example.zh: 守卫在我的票上打孔后，我就上去了。

example.en: a time of political strife
example.zh: 政治纷争四起的时代

example.en: a small village near the equator
example.zh: 赤道附近的小村庄

phrases.zh: 锥齿轮，锥形齿轮；伞齿轮

example.en: Careless use of the clutch may damage the gears.
example.zh: 离合器使用不慎可能会损坏传动装置。

example.en: If the pain persists, you must see a doctor.
example.zh: 如果一直痛，你就必须去看医生了。

phrases.zh: 当作早餐；对于早餐来说

example.en: All the ladies breakfasted in their rooms.
example.zh: 所有女士在她们房间里用了早餐。

example.en: He was dining with friends at the Ritz.
example.zh: 他和朋友在里茨饭店一起进餐。

example.en: The proceedings of the inquiry will take place in private.
example.zh: 调查行动将秘密进行。

example.en: It is about a metre in length.
example.zh: 它大约有一米长。

example.en: The family acknowledge the need for change.
example.zh: 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

phrases.zh: adv. 肩并肩地；齐心协力地

example.en: The residents are being asked to shoulder the costs of the repairs.
example.zh: 居民们被要求承担这笔修理费用。

example.en: I’ll raise the subject when a suitable occasion offers itself.
example.zh: 等有合适的机会，我会把这件事提出来的。

example.en: You should carry your membership card with you at all times.
example.zh: 你应该随身携带会员卡。

example.en: a systematic approach to solving the problem
example.zh: 系统解决问题的办法

phrases.zh: 酶联免疫试剂盒（Enzyme Linked Immunosorbent Assay Kit）
重复工具包；维修工具；工作服

example.en: Sally keeps her make-up kit in her bag.
example.zh: 萨莉把化妆包放在手提包里。

example.en: The paper was highly commended in the UK Press Awards.
example.zh: 该报获得了“英国新闻奖”的高度褒奖。

phrases.zh: 计较（尤指忿恨不满）；郁闷地沉思
念念不忘， 计较（特指忿恨不满）

example.en: Don’t sit at home brooding all day.
example.zh: 别整天坐在家里闷闷不乐的。

example.en: He mused on how different his life would have been, had he not met Louisa.
example.zh: 他默默地想，如果没有遇到路易莎，他的人生会有多么不同。

example.en: She sat quietly, meditating on the day’s events.
example.zh: 她静静地坐着，思考着这一天发生的事。

phrases.zh: 肃静；掩盖，防止…张扬出去

example.en: A sudden hush fell over the crowd.
example.zh: 人群突然变得鸦雀无声。

phrases.zh: 全神贯注于，专心于；把…浸入水中

example.en: She immersed herself in her work.
example.zh: 她埋头工作。

example.en: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities.
example.zh: 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

example.en: Opposition MPs mocked the government’s decision.
example.zh: 反对党议员讥笑政府的这一决策。

example.en: changes that took place during Charlemagne’s reign
example.zh: 查理曼大帝统治时期的变革

example.en: supersonic aircraft
example.zh: 超音速飞机

phrases.zh: 超声波测试；超声波探伤法
超声波清洗；超声波消磁

example.en: ultrasonic waves
example.zh: 超声波

example.en: Stephen earned himself the nickname Hawkeye.
example.zh: 斯蒂芬得了个“鹰眼”的绰号。

example.en: The pub is said to be haunted by the ghost of a former landlord.
example.zh: 据说这个酒吧里经常有一位前任房主的鬼魂出没。

phrases.zh: 国事访问（国家元首至其他国的官式访问）

example.en: Eric went to Seattle to visit his cousins.
example.zh: 埃里克到西雅图去看望他的表兄弟。

example.en: Trains rushed past at frequent intervals.
example.zh: 火车频频驶过。

phrases.zh: 电铲；机铲，动力铲；挖土机

example.en: ...a coal shovel.
example.zh: …一把煤铲。

example.en: Toads have drier, lumpier skins than frogs and spend less time in the water.
example.zh: 蟾蜍的皮比青蛙干燥，疙瘩也更多，呆在水中的时间比青蛙少。

example.en: Our new car is a diesel.
example.zh: 我们的新车是柴油车。

example.en: I seemed to spend my life running errands for people.
example.zh: 我好像一辈子都在为别人跑腿。

example.en: A postmortem was ordered to try to ascertain the cause of death.
example.zh: 下令验尸以查明死因。

phrases.zh: 在地平线上；即将来临的
即将来临，已露端倪；地平以上

example.en: We could see a ship on the horizon.
example.zh: 我们能看见地平线上有一艘船。

example.en: a grassy bank
example.zh: 长满青草的河岸

example.en: Sprinkle the dish with chopped fresh herbs.
example.zh: 在菜肴上撒些切碎的新鲜香草。

example.en: The bolt slid easily into the groove.
example.zh: 插销顺畅地滑入凹槽。

phrases.zh: 仓库管理，仓储管理；仓库治理

example.en: The goods have been sitting in a warehouse for months because a strike has prevented distribution.
example.zh: 因为罢工无法发货，货物已经堆在仓库里好几个月了。

example.en: The children had suffered cruelty and neglect.
example.zh: 这些孩子遭受虐待，无人照管。

example.en: ...taking tiny bites of a hot dog and daintily wiping my lips with a napkin.
example.zh: …小口咬着热狗并用餐巾文雅地擦着我的嘴唇。

example.en: Some members refused to participate.
example.zh: 有些会员拒绝参加。

example.en: Senator Kennedy
example.zh: 肯尼迪参议员

example.en: a comprehensive list of references
example.zh: 详尽的参考书目清单

example.en: an active participant in the negotiations
example.zh: 积极参与谈判的人

phrases.zh: 吸引大量观众的体育运动

example.en: The match attracted over 40,000 spectators.
example.zh: 这场比赛吸引了四万多名观众。

example.en: ...some of the parameters that determine the taste of a wine.
example.zh: …一些决定葡萄酒味道的参数。

example.en: The judge ruled that she should have custody of the children.
example.zh: 法官判定孩子的监护权归她。

example.en: Check your rope frequently, as friction against the rock can wear it away.
example.zh: 要经常检查绳索，因为与岩石摩擦会使它磨损。

phrases.zh: 登山宝训（指圣经马太福音中耶稣在山上所说的话）；山上宝训

example.en: The vicar gave a sermon on charity.
example.zh: 牧师作了一次关于仁爱的布道。

example.en: students who are regularly absent from school
example.zh: 经常缺课的学生

example.en: We’ve had a few disagreements , but we’re still good friends.
example.zh: 虽然有过一些分歧，但我们仍是好朋友。

example.en: Plato believed that the soul is immortal.
example.zh: 柏拉图认为灵魂不灭。

example.en: the poor, wretched girl
example.zh: 极其不幸的可怜姑娘

example.en: Politeness and truth are often mutually incompatible.
example.zh: 礼貌和实话往往互不相容。

example.en: the instability of the market
example.zh: 市场的变化无常

phrases.zh: 未焊透，不完全焊透；未完全熔合

example.en: Unfortunately, I do not have the information because our records are incomplete.
example.zh: 很遗憾，由于我们的记录不完整，我无法提供有关资料。

example.en: It’s getting stuffy in here – do you mind if I open the window?
example.zh: 这里越来越闷了，我开开窗行吗？

example.en: a shower with an opaque glass door
example.zh: 装有不透明玻璃门的淋浴间

phrases.zh: 处理不当；搬运不当；操作不当

example.en: It would be improper of me to comment before the election outcome is known.
example.zh: 在选举结果未知的情况下我作出评论是不恰当的。

example.en: 30% of customers expressed dissatisfaction with the service.
example.zh: 30%的顾客对服务表示不满意。

example.en: a watertight container
example.zh: 不漏水的容器

example.en: The decision will inevitably lead to political tensions.
example.zh: 该决定必然导致政治局势的紧张。

phrases.zh: 不论损失如何全部赔偿

example.en: The course is open to anyone, irrespective of age.
example.zh: 这门课任何人都可参加，没有年龄限制。

example.en: A lot of what has been written about him is inaccurate.
example.zh: 关于他的文字描述有大量失实之处。

example.en: I think he’s being unreasonable.
example.zh: 我认为他是在无理取闹。

example.en: punishment of undesirable behaviour
example.zh: 对不良行为的惩罚

example.en: Jenkins is unfit for public office.
example.zh: 詹金斯不适合担任公职。

example.en: It seems an absurd idea.
example.zh: 这似乎是个荒唐的想法。

example.en: a slight irregularity in his heartbeat
example.zh: 他略微的心律不齐

example.en: He ordered the jury to disregard the witness’s last statement.
example.zh: 他指示陪审团忽略证人的最后一句话。

example.en: All natural minerals contain impurities.
example.zh: 凡天然矿物都含有杂质。

example.en: It invariably rains when I go there.
example.zh: 我每次去那儿都下雨。

example.en: She eventually fell into an uneasy sleep.
example.zh: 她终于睡着了，但睡得并不踏实。

example.en: Humans, dogs, elephants, and dolphins are all mammals, but birds, fish, and crocodiles are not.
example.zh: 人、狗、大象和海豚都是哺乳动物，而鸟、鱼和鳄鱼则不是。

phrases.zh: 食品强化剂；食物的补充
营养补充品；营养增补剂
食品补充剂；保健品；营养品

example.en: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation .
example.zh: 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

example.en: Humanitarian aid is being sent to the refugees.
example.zh: 正向难民提供人道主义援助。

example.en: Carrying goods by train costs nearly three times more than carrying them by barge.
example.zh: 通过铁路运货的成本比驳船运货成本高出近3倍。

example.en: Prices are subject to fluctuation.
example.zh: 价格可能会有波动。

example.en: I hate being treated as an invalid.
example.zh: 我讨厌被当作病人对待。

example.en: the other patients in the ward
example.zh: 病房里的其他病人

example.en: The police force is below strength at the moment (= there are fewer police than there should be ).
example.zh: 目前警力不足。

example.en: an icy wind
example.zh: 刺骨寒风

example.en: We rented a holiday villa in Spain.
example.zh: 我们在西班牙租了一座假日别墅。

example.en: The group was characterized as being well-educated and liberal.
example.zh: 该群体被描绘成受过良好教育，思想开明。

example.en: seemingly unrelated bits of information

example.en: His friends entreated him not to go.
example.zh: 他的朋友们恳求他不要去。

phrases.zh: 集中精力于；全神贯注于

example.en: urban riots
example.zh: 城市骚乱

example.en: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.
example.zh: 法庭裁决该合同必须终止。

example.en: The volcanic lava solidifies as it cools.
example.zh: 火山熔岩冷却后变成固体。

example.en: a deer dazzled by the headlights
example.zh: 被车头灯光照得目眩的鹿

translations.text: 移植（器官、皮肤等）；移植，移种（植物）

phrases.zh: 心脏移植；心脏移植手术

example.en: Surgeons have successfully transplanted a liver into a four-year-old boy.
example.zh: 外科医生成功地给一个四岁的男孩移植了肝脏。

example.en: Could you xerox this letter, please?
example.zh: 请复印一下这封信好吗？

phrases.zh: n. 格里高利·派克（美国男影星）

example.en: birds pecking at breadcrumbs on the pavement
example.zh: 在人行道上啄食面包屑的鸟儿

example.en: Alan took the reins and the small horse started trotting.
example.zh: 艾伦抓住缰绳，小马开始慢跑起来。

example.en: At the time, his ideas were ridiculed.
example.zh: 当时他的观点被人讥笑。

example.en: She chattered away happily until she noticed I wasn’t listening.
example.zh: 她开心地说个不停，直到发觉我没在听才停下来。

example.en: ‘Is that your best outfit?’ he sneered.
example.zh: “那就是你最好的衣服了？”他讥笑道。

example.en: We boycott all products tested on animals.
example.zh: 我们抵制所有拿动物做试验的产品。

example.en: The rich provinces of Asia Minor were plundered by the invaders.
example.zh: 小亚细亚的富饶地区遭到侵略者的劫掠。

example.en: We always endeavor to please our customers.
example.zh: 我们总是竭尽全力让顾客满意。

example.en: They tried to scramble up the cliff.
example.zh: 他们想爬上悬崖。

example.en: The sails flapped in the breeze.
example.zh: 风帆在微风中摆动。

example.en: Men, women and children were slaughtered and villages destroyed.
example.zh: 村庄被毁，男人、女人和儿童惨遭杀戮。

example.en: The ship had to be towed into the harbor.
example.zh: 那艘轮船不得不被拖进港口。

phrases.zh: 信用制度；信贷制度；赊购或赊销制度

example.en: We found his statement hard to credit.
example.zh: 我们觉得他的说法令人难以信服。

example.en: Screw the lid on clockwise.
example.zh: 按顺时针方向拧紧盖子。

example.en: I fell headlong into a pool of icy water.
example.zh: 我一个倒栽葱跌入了冰冷的池水中。

phrases.zh: 粒子计数器；粒子计数管；颗粒测量计数器

example.en: Some actions by the authorities ran counter to the President’s call for leniency.
example.zh: 当局的某些行为和总统呼吁的宽容背道而驰。

example.en: A powerful snow storm is moving eastward.
example.zh: 一场强暴风雪正在东移。

example.en: He sank into deep melancholy.
example.zh: 他陷入深深的忧郁之中。

example.en: At 3:30 p.m. a bulletin was released announcing that the president was out of immediate danger.
example.zh: 下午3:30发布了公告，宣布总统暂时脱离了危险。

example.en: Sales staff get a generous mileage allowance or a company car.
example.zh: 销售人员有优厚的里程补贴或者公司提供的专用汽车。

phrases.zh: 卫生局局长；军医处处长
整形外科医生；骨科医师

example.en: ...a heart surgeon.
example.zh: …一位心脏外科医生。

translations.text: 分析； 分解， 解析

example.en: She still needs to analyse the data.
example.zh: 她仍需要分析这些数据。

translations.text: 突然的， 意外的； 唐突的， 鲁莽的

example.en: an abrupt change of plan
example.zh: 计划的突然改变

example.en: His action had been greeted with almost universal disapproval.
example.zh: 他的行动遭到了几乎一致的反对。

translations.text: 自发的， 无意识的； 自然的， 天真率直的

example.en: The crowd gave a spontaneous cheer.
example.zh: 人群自发地欢呼起来。

translations.text: 遥远的， 偏僻的； 关系疏远的； 脱离的； 绝少的； 微乎其微的； 孤高的， 冷淡的

example.en: a remote border town
example.zh: 一个偏远的边境小镇

example.en: The pipe will rupture at its weakest point.
example.zh: 管道最薄弱的地方会破裂的。

translations.text: 失事，残骸；精神或身体已垮的人

example.en: He was still alive when they pulled him from the wreck.
example.zh: 他们把他从失事的车辆中拖出来时，他还活着。

example.en: ‘You don’t need me,’ she said quietly, without reproach.
example.zh: “你不需要我。”她语气平静，没有丝毫责备。

translations.text: 忧郁的， 沮丧的； 令人沮丧的； 昏暗的， 阴沉的

example.en: The report paints a gloomy picture of the economy.
example.zh: 这篇报告描绘了一幅惨淡的经济现状。

translations.text: 计算， 推算； 计划， 打算

phrases.zh: 适合于……；为适合…而设计的

example.en: These instruments calculate distances precisely.
example.zh: 这些仪器计算距离非常精确。

example.en: an authorized biography
example.zh: 授权传记

example.en: He moved to the seaside for the sake of his health.
example.zh: 他为了健康而迁居海滨。

example.en: a wedding rehearsal
example.zh: 婚礼的预演

translations.text: 叙述文， 故事； 叙述， 讲述

example.en: At several points in the narrative the two stories cross.
example.zh: 叙述中两条故事线多次交织在一起。

example.en: Different workers possess different skills.
example.zh: 不同的工人拥有不同技能。

example.en: I always tried to remain neutral when they started arguing.
example.zh: 他们争论起来的时候我总是努力保持中立。

translations.text: 分析， 分析报告； 分解， 解析

phrases.zh: 解析法；离子微探针质谱仪分析法

example.en: She’s been in analysis for three years.
example.zh: 她接受精神分析治疗已经三年了。

example.en: She devised a method for quicker communications between offices.
example.zh: 她想出一种加快办公室之间通信联络的方法。

translations.text: 三部分的，三方的；三倍的，三重的

example.en: a triple murder investigation
example.zh: 对一宗三重谋杀案的调查

translations.text: 调和， 使缓和； 回火

example.en: Pete hit his brother in a fit of temper .
example.zh: 皮特一气之下打了他弟弟。

translations.text: 感到高兴， 充满喜悦

example.en: Garbo plays the queen, rejoicing in the love she has found with Antonio.
example.zh: 嘉宝饰演沉浸在与安东尼奥爱情的欣喜中的王后。

translations.text: 实物， 物体； 目的， 目标； 对象， 客体； 宾语

phrases.zh: 面向对象的；对象趋向的；物件导向的

example.en: If no one objects, I would like Mrs Harrison to be present.
example.zh: 如果没人反对的话，我想请哈里森夫人出席。

translations.text: 谦逊的；地位低下的；简陋的

example.en: a modest and humble man
example.zh: 一个谦卑的男人

example.en: The car rolled over the edge of a cliff.
example.zh: 汽车翻下了悬崖边。

phrases.zh: 运动模糊；动态模糊；动感模糊
高斯模糊（一种滤镜功能）

example.en: The street lights were blurred by the fog.
example.zh: 街灯在迷雾的笼罩下十分昏暗。

translations.text: 承认，承认…为真；承认失败；允许，让予

example.en: ‘That’s the only possible solution.’ ‘Yes, I suppose so,’ Charles conceded.
example.zh: “那是唯一可行的解决办法。”“对，我想是。”查尔斯承认道。

translations.text: 似有道理的， 似乎正确的， 貌似可信的

example.en: His story certainly sounds plausible.
example.zh: 他的叙述听上去当然很合理。

example.en: They walked down the staircase together.
example.zh: 他们一起沿楼梯通道往下走。

translations.text: 〈口〉无理的， 轻率的， 轻浮的

phrases.zh: [引申]另一方面；唱片的反面；相对立的人

example.en: I was fed up with his flip comments.
example.zh: 我听够了他那些轻率的评论。

example.en: The fans were kept back behind barricades.
example.zh: 歌迷们被拦在路障后面。

translations.text: 挑衅的， 煽动的， 刺激的； 挑逗的

example.en: a provocative act by a terrorist group
example.zh: 恐怖团体的挑衅行为

example.en: a committee meeting
example.zh: 委员会会议

translations.text: 摆出姿势， 装模作样

example.en: She says the president may just be posturing.
example.zh: 她说总统也许只是在作态。

phrases.zh: 分量分析；[化]组分分析；组成成分分析

example.en: Gorbachev failed to keep the component parts of the Soviet Union together.
example.zh: 戈尔巴乔夫没能使苏联各组成部分保持在一起。

translations.text: 套间； 一套家具； 套， 组， 系列

example.en: a honeymoon suite
example.zh: 蜜月套房

translations.text: 顾问； 会诊医师， 专科医生

phrases.zh: 营销顾问；市场顾问；销售顾问

example.en: a management consultant
example.zh: 管理顾问

translations.text: 假扮，化装，伪装；掩盖，掩饰
用来伪装的东西； 伪装， 掩饰

phrases.zh: 伪装，假扮成；托辞；以……为借口

example.en: He escaped across the border disguised as a priest.
example.zh: 他装扮成神父越境逃走了。

example.en: The issues are complex and multi-faceted.
example.zh: 这些问题很复杂，涉及诸多方面。

translations.text: 心胸宽大的， 慷慨的； 自由的， 自由主义的

example.en: a more liberal attitude towards sexuality
example.zh: 对两性关系比较开通的态度

translations.text: 外科， 外科手术； 手术室

example.en: Dr. Hanson is in surgery.
example.zh: 汉森医生在手术室。

translations.text: 调和； 协调； 和谐

example.en: the gorgeous vocal harmonies on ‘Mexicali Rose’
example.zh: 《墨西哥玫瑰》的精彩和声演唱

example.en: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.
example.zh: 巴尼特急需钱来解决他的经济问题。

translations.text: 致死的，致命的；不共戴天的；极度的，十足的

example.en: Broadcast news was accurate and reliable but deadly dull.
example.zh: 新闻广播准确、可靠，但极其枯燥。

phrases.zh: 不可计量，无法计算；难以估计

example.en: Final results had not yet been computed.
example.zh: 最终的结果还未计算出来。

translations.text: 聚集在一起，挤作一团；把身子蜷成一团，蜷缩
挤在一起的人； 一堆杂乱的东西

example.en: We lay huddled together for warmth.
example.zh: 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

phrases.zh: 道路交汇处；道路交叉口；道路交叉

example.en: We crossed at a busy intersection.
example.zh: 我们穿过了一个繁忙的道路交叉口。

translations.text: 防止， 避免； 转移

example.en: The tragedy could have been averted if the crew had followed safety procedures.
example.zh: 如果乘务人员按照安全规则操作，这场悲剧是可以避免的。

translations.text: 想象， 幻想； 想象的产物

example.en: I used to have fantasies about living in Paris with an artist.
example.zh: 我过去常幻想着在巴黎与一位艺术家同住。

example.en: the external appearance of the building
example.zh: 大楼的外观

example.en: He can come with us, provided he pays for his own meals.
example.zh: 只要他付自己的饭钱，就可以跟我们一起来。

translations.text: 仪器， 工具； 乐器

example.en: surgical instruments
example.zh: 外科(手术)器械

phrases.zh: 培养基（培养微生物的养料）

example.en: What size shirt does he wear – small, medium or large?
example.zh: 他穿多大尺码的衬衫——小号、中号还是大号？

translations.text: 透镜， 镜片； 镜头

example.en: a standard 50mm lens
example.zh: 50毫米标准镜头

example.en: The scheme cost a lot more than we had originally envisaged.
example.zh: 该计划的花费大大超出了我们最初所预想的数额。

translations.text: 作为…的动机； 激励， 激发

example.en: Was he motivated solely by a desire for power?
example.zh: 他只是受到权欲的驱使吗？

example.en: Bacteria multiply quickly in warm food.
example.zh: 细菌在温热的食物里繁殖得很快。

translations.text: 赞成， 同意； 认可， 批准

example.en: The president has already given his approval to the plan.
example.zh: 总统已经批准了这个计划。

phrases.zh: 中国移动通讯（世界500强之一）

example.en: a more mobile workforce
example.zh: 具有更强流动性的劳动力

phrases.zh: 多元线性回归；复直线回归

example.en: Baxter was rushed to the hospital with multiple stab wounds.
example.zh: 巴克斯特因多处刺伤被紧急送往医院。

example.en: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.
example.zh: 他撩起T恤衫，露出横贯胸部的锯齿状伤疤。

example.en: the maximum permissible level of radiation
example.zh: 允许的最大辐射水平

example.en: A lot of cancers can now be treated successfully.
example.zh: 现在许多癌症可以治愈。

phrases.zh: 阿特拉斯山脉（阿尔卑斯山系的一部分）

example.en: The atlas was published by our company.
example.zh: 这个地图集是由我们公司出版的。

example.en: The house was surrounded by trees, and invisible from the road.
example.zh: 这所房子树木环绕，从路上是看不见的。

example.en: His eyes were focussed straight ahead.
example.zh: 他的双眼盯着正前方。

example.en: It would be an exaggeration to say that we were close friends.
example.zh: 说我们是密友不免言过其实了。

translations.text: 用钉子钉， 用钉固定； 限定； 将…看成， 将…归入

phrases.zh: 小幅度调整汇率；浮动钉住

example.en: Sarah hung her coat on the peg.
example.zh: 萨拉把外套挂在衣钩上。

translations.text: 杜撰出来的人； 神话

example.en: a book of Greek myths
example.zh: 一本关于希腊神话的图书

example.en: Your summary should be as clear and concise as possible.
example.zh: 你的总结应该尽可能地明白简洁。

translations.text: 含意， 暗示， 暗指； 卷入， 牵连

example.en: They are called ‘Supertrams’, the implication being that (= which is meant to suggest that ) they are more advanced than earlier models.
example.zh: 它们被称作“超级电车”，这是暗指它们比先前的型号更先进。

translations.text: 热情友好的， 热诚的

example.en: The talks were conducted in a cordial atmosphere.
example.zh: 会谈在友好的气氛中进行。

example.en: I was a timid child.
example.zh: 我曾是个胆小的孩子。

example.en: the agony of divided loyalties (= loyalty to two different or opposing people ) for the children in a divorce
example.zh: 父母离婚过程中孩子两面都要依顺的痛苦

translations.text: 改革， 改良， 改造； 改正， 改过自新

example.en: plans to radically reform the tax system
example.zh: 彻底改革税收制度的计划

translations.text: 安装， 设置； 使就职， 任命

example.en: They’ve installed the new computer network at last.
example.zh: 他们终于安装了新电脑网络。

translations.text: 接着发生， 接踵而来， 因而产生

example.en: If the Europeans did not reduce subsidies, a trade war would ensue.
example.zh: 如果欧洲不减少补贴，贸易战将随即爆发。

translations.text: 指出， 指示； 迹象， 暗示

example.en: Could you give me some indication as to when I am likely to receive a reply?
example.zh: 你能给我透露一下什么时候我能收到回复吗？

translations.text: 变得越来越大； 使更大

example.en: The bulk of consumers are based in towns.
example.zh: 大多数消费者都是城镇居民。

phrases.zh: n. 瓷砖（有釉或无釉的）
n. 陶瓷材料；陶瓷原料

example.en: I make ceramic cups there. Do you remember the gift I gave you for your last birthday? Those two cups?
example.zh: 在那里，我可以自己制作陶瓷茶杯。还记得你上次生日时我送你的礼物吗？那两个茶杯？

translations.text: 奇怪的， 异常的； 不舒服的， 眩晕的

phrases.zh: 酷儿理论（指文化中所有非常态的表达方式）

example.en: She gave a queer laugh.
example.zh: 她古怪地笑了笑。

translations.text: 启发， 开导； 开明， 文明

example.en: Isabel looked to Ron for enlightenment.
example.zh: 伊莎贝尔希望得到罗恩的启发。

example.en: a free booklet on drug abuse
example.zh: 关于嗜毒问题的免费小册子

translations.text: 壮丽的， 华丽的； 极好的

example.en: a magnificent performance
example.zh: 气势恢宏的演出

translations.text: 综合病症， 综合症状； 一系列表现

phrases.zh: 严重急性呼吸系统综合症
肾病综合征；肾病症候群

example.en: people who suffer from irritable bowel syndrome
example.zh: 患有肠道过敏综合征的人

example.en: Lambs gamboled in the meadow.
example.zh: 小羊在草地上欢跳。

translations.text: 首要的， 首位的， 首次的

example.en: ...the country's premier opera company.
example.zh: …这个国家最好的歌剧团。

example.en: Mark’s very intellectual.
example.zh: 马克很聪明。

translations.text: 油酥面团， 酥皮糕点

example.en: a Danish pastry
example.zh: 丹麦油酥糕饼

example.en: There will be a messenger at the airport to collect the photographs from our courier.
example.zh: 机场会有一名信使从我们的快递员那儿取走照片。

example.en: She did all this tendon damage and it really disabled her.
example.zh: 她肌腱受了这么多损伤，这真地使她致残了。

translations.text: 实体， 独立存在体， 实际存在物

example.en: The mind exists as a separate entity.
example.zh: 思想作为一个独立的实体存在。

example.en: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the factory.
example.zh: 厂区严禁吸烟。

example.en: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
example.zh: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

translations.text: 速度； 节奏， 行进速度

example.en: the easy tempo of island life
example.zh: 岛上生活的轻松节奏

translations.text: 把…联系在一起；使联合，结合；交往	[ə'səuʃiət]

phrases.zh: v. 联合；与…联系在一起；和…来往
n. 美国大学修满二年课程的肄业证书

example.en: Through science we've got the idea of associating progress with the future.
example.zh: 通过科学我们已有了将进步与未来联系起来的观念。

translations.text: 爬行， 蠕动； 缓慢行进

phrases.zh: 慢行通过的空间；供电线或水管等通过的槽隙

example.en: The floor was crawling with ants.
example.zh: 地板上爬满了蚂蚁。

translations.text: 学院的；学术的；纯理论的，不切实际的

example.en: He possessed no academic qualifications.
example.zh: 他没有学历。

translations.text: 工作， 运行； 起作用
功能，职务；【数】函数；重大聚会

example.en: Her legs have now ceased to function .
example.zh: 她的双腿现在已经丧失正常功能了。

translations.text: 原料，库存品；股本，公债；世系，血统；汤汁；家畜，牲畜

phrases.zh: 股票市场；证券市场；股票交易

example.en: We stock a wide range of kitchen equipment.
example.zh: 我们备有各种厨房用品。

translations.text: 比较， 对照； 比拟， 比喻

example.en: Her paintings invite comparison with those of the early Impressionists (= they remind you of them ) .
example.zh: 她的画作让人想起早期的印象派作品。

translations.text: 蜂拥而出；洋溢，奔放；汹涌，奔腾
洋溢， 奔放； 急剧上升， 猛增； 浪涛般汹涌奔腾

phrases.zh: 缓冲槽；平衡水箱；通风油箱（等于surge chamber）

example.en: The photographers and cameramen surged forward.
example.zh: 那些摄影和摄像师们涌向前去。

example.en: Do you want to swap umbrellas?
example.zh: 你想交换雨伞吗？

phrases.zh: [口语]一会儿，一刹那间，一转眼间

example.en: The old clock ticked noisily.
example.zh: 那只古老的钟大声地嘀嗒着。

translations.text: 基础， 根据； 原则

example.en: Their claim had no basis in fact (=  it was not true  ) .
example.zh: 他们的说法没有事实根据。

phrases.zh: 连续的近似值；连续的学习步骤；逐次近似计算法

example.en: The team has had five successive victories.
example.zh: 这支球队已经连胜五场了。

example.en: a shelf full of paperbacks
example.zh: 放满了平装书的书架

phrases.zh: 黑鹰直升机（80年代美军主力通用直升机）
小鹰号航空母舰 （战斗群） （美）；基蒂霍克（美国北卡罗莱纳州一小村庄）

example.en: Oil thieves sometimes hawk stolen gasoline on the side of highways.
example.zh: 石油大盗们有时在公路边上兜售偷来的石油。

example.en: She despised her neighbours.
example.zh: 她看不起她的邻居。

example.en: They levied religious taxes on Christian commercial transactions.
example.zh: 他们对基督教的商业交易征收宗教税。
